title_abstract: FLAPPER OPERATING SYSTEM WITHOUT A FLOW TUBE A subsurface safety valve features no flow tube to operate the flapper (10) and optionally an equalizing valve (16) in the flapper, if used. It relies on magnetic force (18) that is selectively created to draw the flapper to the open position. A torsion spring (14) can close the valve when the field is removed. Optionally, the fields can be set up to pull and push the flapper (10) open or to do either one. The optional equalizer valve (16) can also be operated by a force field, preferably magnetic.

Driving shield with erector mounted therein According to the invention, the erector (11), designed like a ring erector, is pivotably mounted about the shield axis in a trailing shield (2) which can be braced as a clamping shield against the excavation wall and against which the shield jacks (5) of the main shield (1) put in front are supported. <IMAGE>

Atomizer, aerosol generating device, liquid injection system and liquid injection method The invention discloses an atomizer which comprises a liquid storage part, an atomizing part and a liquid supply pump; a liquid storage cavity is formed in the liquid storage part; a liquid inlet of the liquid supply pump is communicated with the liquid storage cavity; the atomizing part is arranged at a liquid outlet of the liquid supply pump; the liquid storage part is made of a soft material; a liquid injection channel communicated with the liquid storage cavity is formed in the liquid storage part; the liquid injection channel is used for being connected with vacuumizing equipment and a liquid storage container; during liquid injection, the liquid storage cavity can be vacuumized through the liquid injection channel, and aerosol is injected into the liquid storage cavity through the liquid injection channel to form a matrix; and after liquid injection is completed, the liquid injection channel can be closed in a hot melting press fit mode. The atomizer solves the problems that when the atomizer is used, the internal and external pressure difference of the liquid storage part is large, and air easily enters the liquid storage part during liquid injection. The invention further discloses an aerosol generating device with the atomizer, a liquid injection system and a liquid injection method applied to the atomizer.

Maintenance system and method based on security and reliability of cooperative UAVs The invention relates to a maintenance system based on the security and the reliability of cooperative UAVs. The maintenance system comprises multiple airborne system networks and a ground station system; each UAV has an airborne system network; and the airborne system network comprises a state monitoring sub-system, a cooperative UAV link transmission sub-system and an air-to-ground transmissionsub-system. The invention further relates to a maintenance method based on the security and the reliability of the cooperative UAVs. The system can monitor the health state of each UAV in the cooperative UAVs online in real time, and also can make a reasonable maintenance safeguard according to the health state of the UAV. Simultaneously, due to use of an ATG technology, transmission of maintenance safeguard system information does not influence communication between the UAV and the ground.

System and method for communicating media signals A media streaming system for streaming media signals is provided. The media streaming system takes a library of separate and distinct CODECs (145) that are provided as a searchable CODEC library and used in determining specific characteristics in the media signal to identify similar sections of the signal. The media streaming system uses a computer implemented intelligence system, such as an intelligence mechanism to learn and capture the unique charateristics of a signal as the signal is being streamed (150). The media streaming system also compresses and decompresses the media signal as the signals are streamed from a source media (100) to a destination device (130, 135, 140).

PROCESS FOR PRODUCING OPTICALLY ACTIVE AMINO ACID DERIVATIVES AND THE CORRESPONDING OPTICALLY ACTIVE AMINO ACIDS 1452591 Optically active amino-acid derivatives SNAMPROGETTI SpA 10 May 1974 [11 May 1973] 20879/74 Heading C2C An optically active N-substituted aminoacid derivative of formula where X is -CO or -CS-, R is a hydrogen atom or a hydrocarbon radical and R<SP>1</SP> is a hydrocarbon radical is made by selectively hydrolysing, in the presence of a suitable enzyme, a cyclic racemic compound of formula A suitable enzyme is dihydropyrimidinase obtained from calf liver. After the hydrolysis the remaining optically active cyclic compound may be heated at a pH of above 7 to racemize it and the product selectively hydrolysed. The optically active N-substituted amino acid may be converted into the corresponding amino acid of formula

Process for preparing a lactose-free milk A process for preparing lactose-free skimmed, partially skimmed and whole milk is proposed in which: (1) the milk is pasteurized and skimmed; (2) the skimmed milk is hydrolyzed enzymatically by a lactase; (3) the hydrolyzed skimmed milk is microfiltrated to obtain an ultrafiltration retentate (RMF) and a microfiltration permeate (PMF); (4) the PMF is ultrafiltrated and an ultrafiltration retentate (RUF) and an ultrafiltration permeate (PUF) are obtained, 5) the PUF is nanofiltrated and a first nanofiltration retentate (RNF1) and a first nanofiltration permeate (PNF1) are obtained, 6) the PNF1 is nanofiltrated to obtain a second nanofiltration retentate (RNF2) and a second nanofiltration permeate (PNF2), and 7) final step: lactose-free milk is obtained by mixing one or more of the fractions deriving from one or more of the previous steps.

Preparation of cloning vectors for use in streptomyces, escherichia coli and related organisms. The invention provides recombinant DNA cloning vectors comprising a functional origin of replication-containing restriction fragment of plasmid pFJ258, and one or more DNA segments that convey resistance to at least one antibiotic when transformed into a sensitive E. coli or Streptomyces restrictionless host cell that is susceptible to transformation, cell division, and culture.

Process for preparing cholesterol-reduced animal fat, particularly butterfat or butter, and apparatus for their preparation. In a process for producing low-cholesterol butter fat or butter by steam treatment, the fat is treated with steam in one or more horizontal or slightly inclined reaction pipes at a temperature of 195 to 250 DEG C and a pressure of 0.5 to 5 mbar. The steam is injected through steam-outlet holes in the walls of mutually parallel steam pipes which extend through the layer that conducts the liquid fat (oil) along the whole length of the reaction pipe parallel to the axis of the pipe. The vapour is removed and the fat, to which fat recombination substances may be added, is cooled. The low-cholesterol butter fat of butter can be readily obtained in an installation which contains several reaction pipes, and can be advantageously used to manufacture foods and luxury foodstuffs, in particular for dietetic products, or consumed or processed directly as a dietary fat.

MODIFIED CONTEXTS FOR LEVEL CODING OF VIDEO DATA Methods and devices for reconstructing coefficient levels from a bitstream of encoded video data for a coefficient group in a transform unit, and corresponding methods and devices for encoding are provided. The method of reconstructing includes, for each of the non-zero coefficients in the coefficient group, in scan order, decoding a greater-than-one flag for that non-zero coefficient if fewer than two previously-decoded greater-than-one flags for that coefficient group are equal to one. The coefficient levels for the non-zero coefficients are reconstructed based, at least in part, upon the decoded greater-than-one flags.

WIRELESS COMMUNICATION DEVICE AND REMOTE USER INTERFACE DEVICE WITH AUTOMATIC DISCONNECT APPARATUS AND METHOD A portable communication device, such as a cellular telephone, communicates via a wireless communication link with a remote user interface device, such as a hands-free interface. The portable communication device and the remote user interface device each comprises a motion sensor, by which each device can determine motion of the device with respect to the earth. The devices may share, via the wireless communication link, motion messages. The wireless communication link may be terminated as a function of the motion of the devices. After the wireless communication link is terminated, the remote user interface device may automatically enter a low-power mode.

VIRAL STRAIN FOR OBTAINING ATTENUATED LIVE CULTURE VACCINE FOR PREVENTION AND TREATMENT OF HERPES ZOSTER FOR ADULT POPULATION FIELD: biotechnology.SUBSTANCE: invention relates to the field of medical biotechnology. The invention is a cold-adapted strain "vZelVax" of herpes zoster virus, deposited in the State collection of viruses of the FSBI Research Institute of Virology named after Ivanovsky D.I. of the Ministry of Health and Social Development of Russia under the number 2936 of 03.03.2020, intended for obtaining a live cultural vaccine for the prevention and treatment of herpes zoster in the adult population.EFFECT: creation of vaccines against herpes zoster.1 cl, 1 dwg, 5 tbl, 5 ex

DRYER FOR VEGETABLES HAVING REFRIGERATING SYSTEM PURPOSE: An agricultural and marine product drier with a refrigerating system is provided to selectively operate the drying function and the cold storing function of the drier. CONSTITUTION: An agricultural and marine product drier with a refrigerating system includes a body(1), a refrigerator, an inner case(17), a ventilation fan(21), a duct unit, and a heater(23). The body includes a loading chamber(7), a heat insulator(9), and an opening/closing door. The refrigerator is installed on the outer upper side of the body except for an evaporator(15). The inner case includes a wicker tray supporting board(37) and an inlet hole, and transfers cold air into the loading chamber from the evaporator.

METHOD FOR PRODUCING LACTOSE-FREE MILK FIELD: dairy industry.SUBSTANCE: method for the preparation of lactose-free milk is carried out as follows. (1) Milk is pasteurized, degreased, and skimmed milk and cream are obtained, which are hydrolyzed with lactase. (2) Enzymatic hydrolysis of skimmed milk by lactase enzyme is carried out. (3) Hydrolyzed skimmed milk is microfiltered (hereinafter – MF), and microfiltration concentrate (hereinafter – MFC) and microfiltration filtrate (hereinafter – MFF) are obtained. (4) MFF is ultrafiltered, and ultrafiltration concentrate (hereinafter – UFC) and ultrafiltration filtrate (hereinafter – UFF) are obtained. (5) The first UFF nanofiltration is carried out, and the first nanofiltration concentrate (hereinafter – NFC1) and the first nanofiltration filtrate (hereinafter – NFF1) are obtained. (6) Then, the second nanofiltration of NFF1 is carried out, and the second nanofiltration concentrate (hereinafter – NFC2) and the second nanofiltration filtrate (hereinafter – NFF2) are obtained. (7) Lactose-free milk is obtained, using optionally at least one of following stages selected from diafiltration, reverse osmosis, chromatography. In this case, the first nanofiltration at the stage (5) is carried out on membranes with a molecular size of 400-600 Da, and the second nanofiltration at the stage (6) is carried out on membranes with a molecular size of 150-250 Da. The final stage (7) is carried out by mixing a composition consisting of UFC, NFC1 and NFF2 and optionally reverse osmosis filtrate (hereinafter – ROF), when the process includes only the reverse osmosis stage performed on NFF2, ROF and salt eluate (hereinafter – SE), when the process includes the reverse osmosis stage performed on NFF2, and the reverse osmosis concentrate (hereinafter – ROC) thus obtained is fed into a chromatographic column eluted by NFF2 to separate SE from sugar eluate (hereinafter – ZE), reverse osmosis salt concentrate (hereinafter – ROSC), reverse osmosis filtrate (hereinafter – ROF') and the second filtrate ROF', while the specified parts of ROSC and ROF' are formed when NFF2 is subjected to chromatography and eluted with NFF2 part with the formation of two chromatographic fractions SE' and ZE', where SE' is subjected to reverse osmosis to obtain ROSC, as well as ROF' and the second ROF' filtrate formed when ZE', in turn, can be concentrated by reverse osmosis with obtaining sugar concentrate (hereinafter – ROZC), hydrolyzed cream obtained at the stage (1).EFFECT: invention provides for the creation of an innovative multi-stage method for the fractionation of milk, which makes it possible to prepare from the specified fractions a known composition, normal milk or milk with a high protein content and completely lactose-free (<0.01%), which organoleptic characteristics, in particular the degree of sweetness, are similar to properties of corresponding lactose-containing milk.9 cl, 3 dwg, 5 tbl, 5 ex

Tumble drum for mixing food product An improved tumble drum is provided for mixing one food product with another food product, and includes a rotating tumble drum for rotating the products about a drum axis of rotation, with the drum having a product input in one end and a product output in an axial opposing end. A tumble drive motor rotates the tumble drum. Another drive mechanism reciprocates the tumble drum linearly in a direction aligned with the axis of rotation. The product is discharged from the axial opposing end of the tumble drum. A product tray is providing for inputting food product to the tumble drum, and the rotating tumble drum may be fixed to the product tray such that the drive mechanism linearly rotates both the tumble drum and the product tray in a slow forward/backward manner.

TRACEABLE MICRO-ELECTRO-MECHANICAL SYSTEMS FOR USE IN SUBTERRANEAN FORMATIONS Use of traceable micro-electro-mechanical systems ("MEMS") in subterranean formations. A method may comprise introducing a treatment fluid comprising a traceable micro-electro-mechanical system into a wellbore, wherein the traceable micro-electro-mechanical system comprises a micro-electro-mechanical system and a tagging material.
Specific eatable taste modifiers Ingestible compounds which are substantially tasteless and which have been found to be effective reducers or eliminators of undesirable tastes for eatables.

Opposite buckling device The invention provides an opposite buckling device and relates to the technical field of automatic well repairing work equipment. The opposite buckling device comprises a slip and an opposite bucklingbody. The opposite buckling body is connected with the slip so that the opposite buckling body can move integrally along with the slip, when the slip is deflected and floats along with changes of derrick suspending, the opposite buckling body can move integrally along with position changes of the slip, furthermore, the opposite buckling body is provided with an opposite buckling channel, and theopposite buckling channel corresponds to the coupling position of the slip and is used for limiting pipe column butt connection at the coupling position of the slip. Due to integral design on the opposite buckling body and the slip, the displacement between the opposite buckling body and the slip in the opposite buckling process can be eliminated, when butt connection is conducted on a pipe column, the pipe column can be in better butt connection with a pipe column in the slip, and the technical problem that in the prior art, during mechanical hand supporting pipe opposite buckling, precisionis hardly ensured is solved.

Prader-Willi Syndrome long non-coding RNA markers and detection reagent The invention belongs to the field of diagnosis and research of Prader-Willi Syndrome, and particularly provides a series of Prader-Willi Syndrome long non-coding RNA markers capable of being used forblood sample detection, and a detection reagent. According to the present invention, sno-lncRNA1, sno-lncRNA2, sno-lncRNA3, sno-lncRNA4 and sno-lncRNA5 are extremely highly expressed in human embryonic stem cells, and abnormally stable; the gene expression of the No.15 chromosome q11-q13 regions a patient with Prader-Willi Syndrome is deleted, and the minimum core deletion region is 108 kb; undernormal conditions, long non-coding RNAs such as sno-lncRNAs and the like are generated from the region, and can be used as molecular markers of Prader-Willi Syndrome; the detection reagent of the series of the molecular markers is a specific primer pair; the RNA markers are stable, minimally invasive, easy to detect and accurate in quantification, so that the features can improve the sensitivityand the specificity of the detection of Prader-Willi Syndrome; and the gene detection reagent has the advantages of specificity, sensitivity, rapidness, simplicity and convenience.

METHOD FOR PREPARING ION-BOUND DERIVATIVES OF CHITOSAN OLIGOSACCHARIDE FIELD: medicinal and food industry. ^ SUBSTANCE: invention relates to a method for preparing derivatives of chitosan oligosaccharide that can be used as component of different compositions. Method for preparing ion-bound derivatives of chitosan oligosaccharide involves enzymatic depolymerization in the presence of papain and acetic acid followed by spraying drying the product. Then the prepared product is subjected for two-fold dissolving in water and spraying drying by turns regime and then the prepared product is dissolved in water in combination with substances having acidic groups taken among nicotinic acid, lactic acid, glycine hydrochloride, L-carnitine hydrochloride, glutamic acid, gamma-amino-beta-phenylbutyric acid hydrochloride, adenosine phosphate, cocarboxylase, aspartam, gemfibrozil, aminocaproic acid hydrochloride, niflumic acid, succinic acid, ascorbic acid, vitamin B3, methionine or acexamic acid followed by drying the prepared product. Invention provides preparing chitosan oligosaccharides with not completely bound groups that allows using these oligosaccharides as ion-exchange materials with the enhanced effectiveness. ^ EFFECT: improved preparing method. ^ 18 ex

METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR PREDICTING PERFORMANCE OF A DRILLING SYSTEM FOR A GIVEN FORMATION A method and apparatus for predicting the performance of a drilling system f or the drilling of a well bore in a given formation includes generating a geolo gy characteristic of the formation per unit depth according to a prescribed geology model, obtaining specifications of proposed drilling equipment for use in the drilling of the well bore, and predicting a drilling mechanics in response to the specifications as a function of the geology characteristic per unit depth according to a prescribed drilling mechanics model. Responsive to a predicted drilling mechanics, a controller controls a parameter in the drilling of the well bore. The geology characteristic includes at lea st rock strength. The specifications include at least a bit specification of a recommended dri ll bit. Lastly, the predicted drilling mechanics include at least one of bit wear, mechanica l efficiency, power, and operating parameters. A display is provided for generating a display of the geology characteristic and predicted drilling mechanics per unit depth, including either a display monitor or a printer.

Radio frequency transceiver front end circuit with matching circuit voltage divider A front end circuit for coupling an antenna to a radio frequency (RF) transceiver for time domain duplex systems is disclosed. The front end circuit includes an antenna port, a power amplifier, a low noise amplifier, and a matching network. The output of the power amplifier and the input of the low noise amplifier are coupled to the matching network and connected in common to the antenna. The power amplifier and the low noise amplifier are activated and deactivated in sequence corresponding to the transmit and receive modes of the transceiver, and the matching network minimizes the effect that one has on the other at the designated operating frequency.

SUBSTANCE HAVING ACTION CAPABLE OF SUPPRESSING INCREASE OF CHOLESTEROL IN BLOOD AND DRINK AND FOOD USING SAME SUBSTANCE PURPOSE:To obtain the title substance obtained as an acid insoluble fraction containing lignin of phenolic high polymer compound extracted from a wooden material as a main ingredient and capable of adding to food in relatively large amounts without impairing characteristics of food. CONSTITUTION:The aimed substance obtained as an acid insoluble fraction containing lignin of phenolic high polymer compound extracted from a wooden material as a main ingredient. Furthermore, albumen and/or pellicle of cacao bean is directly used as the raw material or a material obtained by subjecting the albumen and/or pellicle to physical treatment such as pulverizing, chemical treatment such as various solvent extraction, biological treatment such as fermentation is used as a raw material and 40-98% concentrated sulfuric acid is added to the above-mentioned raw material at an amount of 2-10 times by vol. to hydrolyze the raw material and the hydrolyzate is filtered and cleaned to provide the aimed substance as the residue. The aimed substance has preferably physicochemical characteristics such as >=200 molecular weight, <=1% sugar content, 1.5-5. 5% nitrogen amount, <=10% fat content, <=10% ash and 5-40% methoxy group number.

Natural gas hydrate pressure-holding coring sample transfer device and application method thereof The invention relates to a natural gas hydrate pressure-holding coring sample transfer device and an application method thereof, and belongs to the field of natural gas hydrate detection and researchequipment. The natural gas hydrate pressure-holding coring sample transfer device successively comprises a first function bin, a second function bin, a third function bin, and a fourth function bin, aplurality of ball valves are arranged at the two ends of the function bins correspondingly, and the function bins are connected with the pressure-holding coring high-pressure vessel ball valves through detachable sealing flange clamps. According to the technical scheme, detachable movable ball valves are arranged in a sample high-pressure transit bin to be matched with various pressure-holding coring high-pressure vessels, a clamping device is arranged in a sample reservoir bin, a sample is clamped manually by adjusting a control handle outside the bin, the sample is prevented from moving left and right, and the integrity of the sample is maintained.

Methods for obtaining positive transformants of a filamentous fungal host cell The present invention relates to methods for obtaining positive transformants of a filamentous fungal host cell, comprising: transforming a tandem construct into a population of cells of the filamentous fungal host a tandem construct and isolating a transformant of the filamentous fungal host cell comprising the tandem construct. The present invention also relates to such tandem constructs, filamentous fungal host cells comprising such tandem constructs, and methods of producing multiple recombinant proteins.

Improvements in signalling devices for controlling or regulating traffic 265,009. Bingham, T. E., and Barber & Colman, Ltd. Feb. 5, 1926. Rotary interrupters; timing-devices. - The signal indicators j, k, m are placed in the roads to be controlled and the circuits of these indicators are completed by stationary contacts g, h, i and rotating contacts d, e, f set in a drum c and connected to a ring o and brush p. The one set of stationary contacts may be adjusted to coact with any of the three sets of rotating contacts to vary the timing, the drum being driven continuously or intermittently by a motor a. A hand contact v and contact-studs w, x, y give manual control when the drum is not rotating. If any device j, k. or m is energized, a winding s breaks a switch t and cuts out a pilot light u. A warning bell q mav be used in parallel with the device m. Specification 262,271, (Class 118 (ii), Signals], is referred to.

Process for the production of chewable cereals kernels A process for the treatment of cereal kernels to make them chewable is described, characterised in that it consists solely of the exposure of the non-treated cereals to short infrared rays of wavelength comprised between 0.5 and 1.5 µm for a time comprised between 15 and 120 seconds. The cereals thus treated have organoleptic and nutritional characteristics similar to the non-treated cereal kernels and have humidity values comprised between 1 and 4%, a density comprised between 0.1 and 0.5 kg/L and a shear force comprised between 5 and 25 N.

COMMUNICATION EFFECTS IN NETWORK SIMULATIONS PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To simulate communication effects in a network simulation.SOLUTION: Real-time, high fidelity communication effects are simulated. A transmitter in a platform simulation is requested to send a surrogate message to a receiver in the platform simulation. Communication effects are computed in response to the message, and the communication effects are saved for later use. When a future communication event involving the transmitter and receiver occurs, the saved effects are used to simulate the communication effects for that event.

Oleogel-based emulsion with stable interface crystallization as well as preparation method and application of oleogel-based emulsion The invention belongs to the technical field of emulsion processing, and provides an oleogel-based emulsion with stable interface crystallization as well as a preparation method and application of the oleogel-based emulsion. An oleogel dispersion phase consists of gel and liquid oil, a water continuous phase consists of amphiphilic functional lipid and water, and the oleogel dispersion phase and the water continuous phase are mixed and subjected to homogeneous emulsification to prepare an oil-in-water gel type emulsion with gel crystals attached to an oil-water interface. The amphiphilic functional lipid interacts with the gel, so that gel crystals without interfacial activity are induced to be anchored on the oil-water interface, a solid-like rigid interfacial film is formed, the oleogel-based emulsion is stabilized by interfacial crystallization, the storage stability of the oleogel-based emulsion is enhanced, the application range of the oleogel-based emulsion in the fields of foods, cosmetics and the like is widened.

SOLID-STATE IMAGING ELEMENT AND ELECTRONIC APPARATUS A solid-state image capturing element (10) includes a noise-cancelling-signal generating circuit (12) connected to a pixel power source (PW) and configured to execute, on a generated first noise cancelling signal (NC1), a gain change and a polarity inversion to output a second noise cancelling signal (XNC1); a DA converter (13) configured to generate and output a reference signal (RAMP) and convert a current of the second noise cancelling signal (XNC1) into a voltage to superpose the converted voltage on the reference signal (RAMP); a comparator (14) where the reference signal (RAMP) and a pixel signal (VSL) are input to a main body part of the comparator (42) via an input capacity connected to one of terminals of a differential pair, the comparator outputting an inversion signal according to the pixel signal (VSL) and a gain setting; a counter (18) that converts an inversion timing of a comparator (14) into a digital value; and a gain controlling unit (15) that outputs, when changing a gradient of the reference signal (RAMP) and the input capacity to execute a gain control on the comparator (14), the gain controlling signal based on a change amount in the input capacity.

DIELECTRIC CHIP ANTENNAS There is disclosed an antenna arrangement having a parasitic conductive loop (1) and at least one active radiating element (9). The conductive loop (1) comprises first and second electrically conductive passive radiating elements (2,3) each with first and second ends. The first ends of the passive radiating elements are each connected to ground, and the second ends of the radiating elements are each connected respectively to mutually discrete metalized surface regions (8) of a dielectric block (7). The at least one active radiating element (9) is not conductively connected to the passive radiating elements (2,3). The passive radiating elements (2,3) are configured to be fed parasitically by the at least one active radiating element (9). The antenna arrangement has excellent resistence to detuning and can be located in different regions of a PCB substrate without significantly affecting performance. Further, the antenna is small in size and may be arranged for dual band operation.

Manufacturing method of salted-anchovies The present invention relates to a method for manufacturing anchovy sauce which can satisfy consumer preferences. The method for manufacturing anchovy sauce comprises: a first step of storing sea salt in a cool space for one to two years; a second step of manufacturing a first mixture by mixing anchovy and the sea salt; a third step of aging the first mixture; a fourth step of filtering the aged first mixture to obtain a filtrate; a fifth step of manufacturing a second mixture by mixing the first mixture and the filtrate; a sixth step of aging the second mixture; and a seventh step of filtering the second mixture.

Stranger foothold studying and judging method and system The invention discloses a stranger foothold studying and judging method and system. The method comprises the steps of obtaining snapshot data; performing feature comparison according to the face snapshot image to obtain an identity comparison result; processing the identity comparison result by adopting a pre-configured high-frequency stranger identification rule, and screening out high-frequencystrangers appearing at high frequency and activity rules of the high-frequency strangers; acquiring real-time data of an elevator control system and video stream data of an elevator monitoring system;and extracting video frames from the video stream data according to the elevator door opening time in the real-time data, comparing the extracted video frames with all the screened high-frequency strangers, associating the elevator operation information with the high-frequency stranger with the highest comparison similarity, obtaining an activity rule of the high-frequency stranger, and generating complete foothold information. According to the invention, accurate and fresh floating population foothold data can be ensured, police force can be released, the working efficiency of community police is improved, and the public security prevention and control and social service capabilities of communities are improved.

COSMETIC COMPOSITION CONTAINING FUSION PROTEIN WITH SKIN PENETRATION ENHANCING PEPTIDE CONJUGATED THERETO FOR SKIN IMPROVEMENT The present invention relates to a cosmetic composition containing a fusion protein with a skin penetration enhancing peptide conjugated thereto for skin improvement and, more specifically, to a fusion protein in which PDGFa is conjugated to a skin penetration enhancing peptide, a cosmetic composition containing the fusion protein for skin improvement, a functional cosmetic product for skin improvement, a cosmetic composition for hair loss relief, and a quasi-drug product composition containing the fusion protein.

Control logic method and system for optimizing production from natural gas wells In a system for optimizing natural gas production in response to real-time variations in wellbore parameters, a PLC or other wellsite intelligence technology is used to monitor liquid and gas production from the wellbore under friction-loaded conditions. Using baseline production data obtained during production tests, the PLC determines and initiates the appropriate operating mode for the wellbore to optimize a selected production criterion to suit measured wellbore parameters. The operating mode either a continuous clean-out mode, in which gas is continuously injected into the wellbore to control liquid loading, or an intermittent clean-out, in which liquid loading is regulated by intermittent gas injection. In preferred embodiments, the system uses bladder-type control valves having upstream and downstream solenoids, to control production tubing flow rate within a range between upper and lower set points.

Method and system for controlling access to media file Systems and/or methods (''tools'') are described that enable encrypted media files to be sent without revocation lists while permitting the encrypted media files to be passed to trusted entities. Thetools may also ensure continuation of protection when media files are passed between different protection systems.

NONRESIDENT SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR DEPRESSURISING SUBSEA APPARATUS AND LINES The invention relates to a nonresident system for depressurising subsea apparatus and lines, comprising a depressurising tool (5) suitable for coupling to an ROV interface (6) of a subsea apparatus, in which the depressurising tool (5) is coupled to an ROV (4), in which: the ROV interface (6) comprises a first pipeline (6a) for connection to a first hydrocarbon transport line (8), a second pipeline (6b) for connection to a second hydrocarbon transport line (9), and a connection mandrel (6d); and the depressurising tool (5) comprises a suction pipeline (5a) suitable for connecting to the first pipeline (6a) for connection to the first hydrocarbon transport line; a discharge pipeline (5b) suitable for connecting to the second pipeline (6b) for connection to the second hydrocarbon transport line; a pump (5c); and a connector (5d) suitable for connecting to the connection mandrel (6d) of the ROV interface (6). The invention also relates to a method for depressurising subsea apparatus and lines, comprising the steps of: removal of a blind cap (15) from an ROV interface (6) with the assistance of an ROV; coupling of a depressurising tool (5) to the ROV interface (6) of a subsea apparatus (10); suction and removal of fluid in a first hydrocarbon transport line, in which the first hydrocarbon transport line comprises hydrate formation; and pressurisation and reinjection of fluid in a second hydrocarbon transport line.

AGGLOMERATION-PREVENTABLE SWEETENER COMPOSITION IN WHICH AGGLOMERATION IS PREVENTED, AND METHOD FOR PREPARING SAME The present invention relates to an agglomeration-preventablea sweetener composition treated to prevent agglomeration and to a method for preparing same. More particularly, the present invention relates to an agglomeration-preventablea sweetener composition treated to prevent agglomeration by coating sweetener powder particles with dietary fiber, and to a method for preparing same.

Air fryer with water spraying function The invention discloses an air fryer with water spraying function, which includes a lower body, an inner container, a food frying screen and a sprayer. The lower part of the lower body is provided with supporting legs. The upper part of the lower body is provided with a top support. A middle supporting body is arranged between the top support and the lower body. The front side of the top support is provided with a display screen and a control button. One side of the display screen is provided with an indicator lamp. The middle part of the inner part of the bottom body is provided with a fryersupport body. The air fryer has the advantages that: the circulating motor drives the circulating blade to rotate to form a high-speed flowing hot air circulation cavity in the air fryer. The rapid frying process of food is realized. The automatic water spraying function is also provided. The range of the fried food is effectively enlarged. The fryer is with simple operation, high frying efficiency and strong practicability.

Caliper steerable tool for lateral sensing and accessing Embodiments of a method and apparatus for locating lateral wellbores extending from a main wellbore includes a caliper sensing tool having spring actuated calipers extending radially therefrom. Each of the calipers is connected to a sensor, such as a linear variable displacement sensor, that is used to calculate the radial extension distance of the respective caliper. When the tool is inserted through a wellbore and moves past a lateral wellbore opening, the calipers extend into the lateral wellbore opening. The extension, as well as contact with the surfaces of the lateral wellbore, are used to determine the wellbore depth location and azimuthal direction of the lateral wellbore. A deflectable steering arm is operable to be selectively steered into the lateral opening to facilitate access to the lateral wellbore for logging or intervention purposes.

PROCESS FOR THE TREATMENT OF ASPARTAME AND ASPARTAME PREPARED BY THIS PROCESS The process for the treatment of dried aspartame is characterised in that, in a first separation step, particles smaller than 50 Tm are removed for the most part, with the aid of a stream of air. In a second separation step, the product resulting from the first step is subjected to a screening step using a screen that separates at a value between 150 and 250 fm, after which the fraction of the smaller particles thus obtained is recovered as a first product and the fraction of the larger particles is recovered as the second product or is optionally subjected to a further separation step using a screen that separates at a value between 400 and 1000 em, the fraction of smaller particles thus obtained being recovered as second product.

CONTRAST ACCENTUATION This invention relates to a method for improving contrast accentuation in the case of the re-recording of originals in the sphere of electronic image processing by means of graving devices and scanners. An image signal is obtained by scanning an original opto-electronically dot-by-dot and line-by-line, and at least one surround signal is obtained by evaluating the surrounding area of the image dots. A correction signal which is superimposed on the image signal for the purpose of contrast accentuation is derived from the surround signal and the image signal. The original is thereupon re-recorded on a recording medium to an optional reproduction scale. The magnitude of contrast accentuation on the recording medium is adjusted by varying the width of overlap of the image signal and correction signal irrespective of the actual reproduction scale, In the case of enlargements in particular, troublesome border patterns on outlines are averted or at least reduced in such degree that they are no longer noticeable to the beholder.

METABOLICALLY OPTIMIZED CELL CULTURE An improved method for large scale production of proteins and/or polypeptides in cell culture is provided. In accordance with the present invention, the method provides for culturing cells that have metabolically shifted. The use of such a method or system allows high levels of protein or polypeptide production and reduces accumulation of unwanted metabolic waste such as lactate. Proteins and polypeptides expressed in accordance with the present invention may be advantageously used in the preparation of pharmaceutical, immunogenic, or other commercial biologic compositions, such as antibodies.

USER TERMINAL In order to appropriately control repeated transmission in which one or more transmission/reception points are utilized, a user terminal according to one embodiment of the present disclosure has: a control unit for determining, on the basis of a set of transmission parameters respectively set for each repetition in repeated transmission and information included in downlink control information for designating the repeated transmission, a prescribed condition applied to each repetition; and a reception unit for receiving a downlink shared channel repeatedly transmitted from the one or more transmission/reception points on the basis of the prescribed condition.

Manipulation of multi-component geophone data to identify downhole conditions Methods and apparatus for using multi-component geophones and/or multi-component geophone arrays to measure flow-induced acoustic energy produced in wellbores are provided. With the use of the multi-component geophones, the measured acoustic energy may be resolved into its directional components. The computed directional energy components may be mathematically compared to numerically highlight ambient flow conditions (e.g., leaks in casing or other conduit, points of fluid entry/exit/restrictions between the casing and the formation). The use of an array of multi-component geophones allows for the use of geophone move-out curves to further identify acoustic energy source locations.

Revocation information management Systems and/or methods ("tools") are described that enable encrypted media files to be sent without revocation lists while permitting the encrypted media files to be passed to trusted entities. The tools may also ensure continuation of protection when media files are passed between different protection systems.

GENERATING DEVICE-LEVEL LOGICAL MODELS FOR A NETWORK Systems, methods, and computer-readable media for generating switch-level logical models of a network. In some examples, a system can obtain a logical model of a network, such as software-defined network (SDN). The logical model can represent a configuration of objects and object properties defined based on a schema associated with the network. Based on the logical model, the system can generate arendered logical model of the network and, based on the rendered logical model, generate, for one or more network devices in the network, a respective device-specific representation of the logical model. The respective device-specific representation can project the logical model to a respective network device, such as a switch in the fabric of the network.

Physical layer processing for a wireless communication system using code division multiple access The invention includes various embodiments for use in physical layer processing. One embodiment determines the address mapping of bits in the physical channel buffer form the address of bits in the first interleaver buffer. The physical channel buffer addresses are determined corresponding to addresses of the bits after rate matching, bit scrambling, second interleaving and physical channel mapping. The bits are directly read from the first interleaver buffer and written to the physical channel buffer using the determined physical channel buffer addresses. Another embodiment determines the address mapping of bits in the first interleaver buffer from the address of bits in the physical channel buffer. The first interleaver buffer addresses are determined corresponding to addresses of the bits after reverse rate matching, reverse bit scrambling, reverse second interleaving and reverse physical channel mapping. The bits are directly read from the determined first interleaver buffer addresses and written to the physical channel buffer addresses.

system and method for personally customizing a hardcover house The invention discloses a system and method for personally customizing a hardcover house. A digital hardcover scheme is obtained through the three-dimensional modeling hardcover scheme of the personalized customization system of the hardcover room and scheme information corresponding to the digital hardcover scheme, wherein the scheme information comprises soft installation scheme information andhard installation scheme information; Therefore, the proprietor can visually and conveniently check the hardcover scheme. in addition, the personalized customization system of the hardcover room performs three-dimensional modeling on home decoration commodities to obtain digital commodities; and the replaceable digital commodity is matched according to the scheme information, so that the proprietor can select the commodity for replacing the original hardcover scheme within the selectable commodity range, and obtain the personalized customized hardcover scheme package, thereby enabling the proprietor to carry out personalized demand customization on the basis of the hardcover scheme.

PROCESS FOR PURIFYING GROWTH HORMONE-LIKE MATERIALS A process is provided for separating impurities from an impure mixture containing growth hormonelike material, which comprises: (1) applying said mixture to a reverse phase macroporous acrylate ester copolymer resin support at a pH of from about 7 to about 9; and (2) eluting said growth hormone-like material from said support with an aqueous eluant having a pH of from about 7 to about 9 and containing from about 20% to about 80% by volume of an organic diluent selected from the group consisting of acetone, acetonitrile, and a combination of acetone and acetonitrile.

CIGARETTE FILTER (VERSIONS) AND CIGARETTE WITH FILTER FIELD: tobacco industry. ^ SUBSTANCE: cigarette filter and its versions are designed to soften taste when smoking. The cigarette filter comprises a filtering plug, having a cylindrical body of a wrap, and a filtering material arranged in a cylindrical body. Wrapping of the filtering plug is formed from highly strong and highly permeable paper, longitudinal rigidity of which makes 30 or more, when measured in accordance with the standard JIS P8143, and air permeability makes 1000 units of Coresta or more. Versions are related to a cigarette filter, comprising multiple filtering plugs, which uses highly strong and highly permeable paper as wrapping for a filtering plug to wrap a filtering material and/or as a shaping paper that connects multiple filtering plugs. The invention also relates to a cigarette with a filter. ^ EFFECT: improved quality of cigarettes by increasing ventilation ratio, providing of possibility of fresh air supply for a higher dissolution of smoke inhaled by a smoker and reduction of a cigarette prime cost. ^ 17 cl, 9 dwg, 4 ex
REGULATION OF GENE EXPRESSION USING ENGINEERED NUCLEASES The present disclosure is in the field of genome engineering, particularly targeted modification of the genome of a hematopoietic cell.

Combined milling and impact apparatus for tunneling A support displaceable along a tunnel or gallery floor by means of a caterpillar drive is provided with a rotatable milling tool that can be brought into engagement with a lower portion of a face wall and with a reciprocal hammer engageable with an upper portion of the wall. The miller is operated to cut or grind material off the lower portion so as to undercut the wall. Then the hammer is operated to chip or break off the upper portion of the undercut wall. Both the miller and hammer are mounted on adjustable and directable arms. The loosened rock is carried off by a scoop-transport belt arrangement.

Heat-resisting gene CRY1 and application thereof, microzyme and preparation method and application of microzyme The invention discloses a heat-resisting gene CRY1 and an application thereof, microzymes and a preparation method and application of the microzymes. The heat-resisting gene CRY1 is a gene which can arouse a heat shock reaction of plants, the microzymes and human cells and increase heat resistance, and can be applied to increasing the high temperature resistant capacity of plants, animals and microorganisms and increasing the resistance of the microorganisms to toxic protein. The invention also provides the microzymes with the heat-resisting gene CRY1 in a shifting manner. The preparation method of the microzymes comprises the steps of enabling a PCR amplification product having a CRY1 sequence to be connected with a carrier to obtain recombinants, transforming the recombinants to escherichia coli, and performing extraction to obtain plasmid; and transforming plasmid DNA and denaturated salmon roe DNA into competence yeast so as to obtain the heat-resisting microzymes containing pNH604-CRY1-mKate-NLS. The heat-resisting microzymes have high high-temperature resistant capacity, influence of high temperature to fermentation flavor and yield of metabolism products can be avoided, andthe heat-resisting microzymes have great prospects in the field of foods, medicines and the like.

POURABLE FATTY DISPERSIONS. The present invention provides a hardstock fat which is suitable for stabilizing a dispersion of a non-fat phase in a triglyceride oil, including liquid margarines, which hardstock fat consists of a mixture of triglycerides, characterized in that: at least two triglycerides having a melting point >55°C each have a concentration of at least 5 wt.%, the amount of triglycerides having fatty acid residues with a difference in chain length of the longest and the shortest residue of at least four carbon atoms is at least 15 wt.% and the amount of triglycerides with a melting point of 25-55°C is <= 25 wt.%.

SYSTEM FOR SOUND EVALUATION IN A DESIGNATED AREA A method and system to provide an aggregate noise level value for a specific location. The system is based on distributed computation by a noise evaluation application. A database interface is coupled to a plurality of relevant databases. A user interface device including an input device accepts the request of noise data relating to the specific location. The application aggregates relevant data in proximity to the requested location from the database interface. An aggregate noise level value is calculated for the requested location. The value is stored in a database and returned to the user interface device.

COMPOSITIONS AND METHODS FOR TREATING LEUKEMIA. Treatment of acute myeloid leukemia with an agent that inhibits BRD4 is disclosed. Treatment of acute myeloid leukemia with an agent that inhibits BRD4 is disclosed. The present disclosure provides lipid-probe compounds, and compositions comprising the compounds. A subject lipid-probe compound is useful for various imaging applications, which are also provided.

Downhole sampling apparatus and method A method and apparatus for reducing debris in a perforation in a wellbore extending from the wellbore into a subterranean formations is provided. A housing is positioned in the wellbore, and an arm is extended therefrom. One or more plugs are positionable in the perforation via the arm. The plug is adapted to block debris from formation fluid flowing into the housing via the perforation whereby the contamination in the formation fluid is reduced. The plug may be a filter positionable in the perforation, or a bit activated to dislodge debris.

COFFEE COMPOSITION CONTAINING INSTANT FREEZE DRIED AND NATURAL ROASTED FINE-GRAINED COFFEE HAVING FRESHLY BREWED NATURAL COFFEE TASTE AND AROMA AND ITS PRODUCTION METHOD FIELD: food industry. ^ SUBSTANCE: invention relates to food industry, in particular to a technology of instant coffee production with the help of the freeze-drying method and may be used at coffee manufacturing enterprises. The finished coffee composition is based on freeze-dried coffee containing natural roasted fine-grained coffee inside freeze-dried granules; it has the organoleptic properties of freshly brewed ground natural coffee requiring no brewing. According to the described methods during manufacturing process natural roasted fine-grained coffee of one kind or different kinds mixed (depending on the required finished product organoleptic properties) is added into concentrated thin coffee essence before freeze-drying. ^ EFFECT: coffee composition and method in accordance with the invention allows to extend freeze-dried coffee assortment by way of adding water-insoluble food additives within one technological cycle. ^ 7 cl, 1 ex
Eatable taste modifiers Ingestible compounds which are substantially tasteless and which have been found to be effective reducers or eliminators of undesirable tastes for eatables.

Apparatus for stretching plastic dough. An apparatus for stretching plastic dough comprises a plurality of conveyors (1, 2) arranged in series and a plurality of rollers (3) disposed above the conveyors and cooperatively acting to stretch dough fed therebetween. The rollers are freely rotatable and their shafts (4) are fixed to connecting arms (5) which reciprocate them above the conveyors.

Community management system The invention relates to a community management system, which comprises a management server and a network server, and is characterized in that the management server is connected with a community shopping mall, a community security system and a property management system through a local area network; a community management platform, an intelligent terminal user whose exchanges information with the community management platform, a community information database which stores the community management platform, a community information display system which provides community service information, wherein the intelligent terminal user exchanges information with the community management platform through a broadband network or a wireless network. The community management platform comprises a householder information management module, a floating population management module, a house renting management module and a health file management module, the invention provides an omnibearing real-time management system, which can actively cope with the conditions in the community, quickly respond to the requirements of community residents, and enhance the safety and comfort of the community residents.

BASE STATION, USER TERMINAL, AND PROCESSOR PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To make efficient use of D2D communication.SOLUTION: A base station 200 includes: a transmission unit that transmits, to a user terminal 100-1, a measurement request (S102) that requests the user terminal to measure the reception strength of a signal transmitted by another user terminal 100 that is performing D2D communication; a reception unit that receives, from the user terminal 100-1, measurement information (S104) indicating the reception strength measured according to the measurement request (S102); and a control unit that uses the measurement information (S104) to determine whether or not the D2D communication is available to the user terminal 100-1. If the control unit determines the D2D communication to be available to the user terminal 100-1, the control unit gives the user terminal 100-1 instructions (S106) to perform the D2D communication.

Methods of determining antibiotic resistance This disclosure relates to methods of determining an antibiotic resistance profile of a bacterium, and methods of treating a patient with a therapeutically effective antibiotic. The methods include comparing the restriction map of the nucleic acid with a restriction map database, and determining antibiotic resistance of the bacterium by matching regions of the nucleic acid to corresponding regions in the database.

SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR COMMUNICATING MEDIA SIGNALS A media streaming system for streaming media signals is provided. The media streaming system takes a library of separate and distinct CODECs (145) that are provided as a searchable CODEC library and used in determining specific characteristics in the media signal to identify similar sections of the signal. The media streaming system uses a computer implemented intelligence system, such as an intelligence mechanism to learn and capture the unique charateristics of a signal as the signal is being streamed (150). The media streaming system also compresses and decompresses the media signal as the signals are streamed from a source media (100) to a destination device (130, 135, 140).

MANIPULATION OF MULTI-COMPONENT GEOPHONE ARRAY DATA TO IDENTIFY DOWNHOLE CONDITIONS Methods and apparatus for using multi-component geophones and/or multi-component geophone arrays to measure flow-induced acoustic energy produced in wellbores are provided. With the use of the multi-component geophones, the measured acoustic energy may be resolved into its directional components. The computed directional energy components may be mathematically compared to numerically highlight ambient flow conditions (e.g., leaks in casing or other conduit, points of fluid entry/exit/restrictions between the casing and the formation). The use of an array of multi-component geophones allows for the use of geophone move-out curves to further identify acoustic energy source locations.

NON-FRIED DRY INSTANT COOKING NOODLES AND A METHOD FOR PRODUCING SAID NOODLES 1522284 Non-fried instant noodles KANEBO KK 31 Jan 1977 [19 April 1976 5 Aug 1976] 03823/77 Heading A2B Non-fried instant cooking noodles, reconstitutable in water at 85C within 3 minutes, comprise a starch material, constituted mainly by wheat flour and having an alpha conversion degree (by a defined enzyme test) of at least 93%, and 1-6wt.% NaCl; are coated with 0.2-5wt.% oil and 0.01-5wt.% emulsifier for said oil; and have a structure of irregularly-shaped cells. (All percentages are with respect to the dry weight of the noodles). The noodles are made by (i) forming a mixture of starch component, NaCI, water and, optionally, additives such as binding gums, Na polyphosphate and Na/ K carbonates and phosphates, into noodles, preferably of thickness not more than 1.3mm, (ii) coating with an aqueous emulsion containing the oil and emulsifier, (iii) heating with steam of pressure 0.5-1.5kg/cm<SP>2</SP>, preferably for 2-5 minutes, to convert the starch, and (iv) drying at 60C or above, e.g. with hot air at up to 130C for 5-80 minutes, to form the porous structure. The noodles from (i) may contain 25-40wt.% water and the cooling step (ii) may apply 2.7-18% water based on the dry weight of the raw noodles. The dried noodles should not contain more than 15wt.% water. The starch component preferably contains at least 70wt.% wheat flour and may also include cornflour, buckwheat flour, rice flour and starch. The oil may be rice bran oil, corn oil, rape oil, sesame oil, soybean oil or salad oil, and the emulsifier may be a sucrose, sorbitan, propylene glycol or glycerin fatty acid ester or lecithin.

Weight-losing food The invention discloses a weight-losing food which is characterized by being composed of the following raw materials in parts by weight: 2-5 parts of corn, 2-5 parts of oat flakes, 1-5 parts of Chinese yam, 10-15 parts of dietary fiber, 2-5 parts of spirulina, 1-4 parts of coix seed, 2-8 parts of red bean, 2-5 parts of inositol, and 10-15 parts of maltose. The weight-losing product prepared by adopting a variety of ingredients contains a lot of fiber substances, has low energy, allows the satiety to be easily produced, can replace a meal for eating, and can play a role in losing weight based on guarantee of body health with long-term use.

Level shifter A level shifter is disclosed and includes at least four Type 1 transistors and at least four Type 2 transistors. The sources of several Type 1 transistors are electrically connected to a first voltage terminal while the sources of several Type 2 transistors are connected to a second voltage terminal. The level shifter receive an input signal and outputs a logically equivalent output signal with higher voltage, wherein the voltage of the output signal is between the voltages of the first voltage terminal and the second voltage terminal.

RNA INTERFERENCE TO ACTIVATE STEM CELLS The present invention relates to the use of interferent RNAs that silence PW1 expression in order to activate adult stem cells in vitro or in vivo, in particular in the context of regenerative medicine.

DEVICE FOR SUPPORTING DIRECT DRIVE EXCAVATOR IN OFF-CENTERED POSITION OF OIL WELL PURPOSE: To move a drilling device without limiting a floor space when the drilling device is not used by providing a moving device to laterally move a drilling device and a guiding device. CONSTITUTION: A direct drive drilling device consisting of a power swivel 12 is suspended from a traveling block 24 moved approximately vertically within a derrick 16 during drilling of a well 34. Thereafter, a moving device is provided to move a guiding device to guide the drilling device and a moving device to laterally move the drilling device to a position offset from the axis of a well 34. Further, guide rails 42 and 47 are laid for the guiding device and the moving device, respectively. Then there is no need to use the drilling device, the guide rails 42 and 72 are positioned in alignment with each other and the drilling device suspended in a position offset from a well axis is laterally moved.

Distributed system and data operation method thereof The present invention discloses a distributed system and a data operation method thereof. The system comprises a client, a master node, a plurality of storage nodes and a plurality of computing nodes. The client is configured to send a data operation request to the master node. The master node is configured to respond to the client's request, acquire a storage node list, and then send the storage node list to the client. The plurality of storage nodes are configured to store data requested by the client for operation. The plurality of computing nodes are configured to execute a computing task allocated by the master node based on the client's data operation request. For acquiring the storage node list, the master node employs a copy location selection policy to select a storage node corresponding to a data copy. The copy location selection policy comprises at least one of the following manners: selecting a storage node with a low storage load, selecting a computing node with a low computing load, and selecting a storage node with a poor locality.

Radio frequency transceiver front end circuit A front end circuit for coupling an antenna to a radio frequency (RF) transceiver for time domain duplex systems is disclosed. The front end circuit includes an antenna port, a power amplifier, a low noise amplifier, and a matching network. The output of the power amplifier and the input of the low noise amplifier are coupled to the matching network and connected in common to the antenna. The power amplifier and the low noise amplifier are activated and deactivated in sequence corresponding to the transmit and receive modes of the transceiver, and the matching network minimizes the effect that one has on the other at the designated operating frequency.

FIBER CONTAINING COMPOSITIONS AND METHODS OF MAKING AND USING SAME. A composition comprising at least about 25% of a fiber component, by weight of the composition, provides a safe and effective amount of fiber component to a user. A method of producing such a composition is provided. Additionally a method of providing a safe and effective amount of fiber component to a user is provided.
Compositions and methods for treating leukemia The invention provides compositions, methods, and kits for the treatment of acute myeloid leukemia in a subject.

BREAD COOLER PURPOSE: To comparatively speedily cool just baked bread by generating the current of air for cooling through the inside of bread to the outside during the rotations of a carrousel. CONSTITUTION: The bread is moved from an oven or the like through a carry-in conveyer, batching conveyer and conditioning conveyer onto the carrousel. While the carrousel is rotated, the bread is held between a pair of members 7. On both the sides of each station of the carrousel, a lot of needles 14 are supported by needle frame members 13, the needles 14 are inserted from both the sides of bread on a rack 8 into the bread, and cold air is blown through the needles 14 into the bread. The rack of cooled bread is moved onto the conditioning conveyer and the bread is moved from the rack onto a carry-out conveyer one by one.

CIGARETTE HOLDER FOR SMOKE DILUTION There is provided a smoke mouthpiece (1) for the dilution of smoke from a smoking element, such as a cigarette (11), to an exhaust region (7), comprising an internal longitudinal channel with openings at both ends and divided into 5 channel sections, wherein a first channel section (2) is provided in the first end of the smoking mouthpiece (1) with an opening for insertion of the smoking element (11), where a second channel section (3) for holding the smoking element (11) is in axial extension of the first channel section (2) with a smaller cross-section than the first channel section (2), where a third channel section (4) is in axial extension of the second channel section (3) to stop the end of the cigarette, where a fourth channel section (5) for diluting the smoke of the smoking element is in axial extension of the third channel section (4), where a fifth channel section (6) is provided at the other end of the smoking mouthpiece (1) in axial extension of the fourth channel section (5), wherein one or more air channels (8), (8'), (8") are provided in the one or more channel sections for diluting the smoke of the smoking element with atmospheric air, said air channel(s) (8), (8'), (8") ensure passage of atmospheric air from the first channel section (2) to the fourth channel section (5) when the smoking element (11) is in place in the second channel section.

NEUTRAL PROTEASE (NP) AND PRODUCT BY USING NEUTRAL PROTEASE FOR TISSUE DISSOCIATION AS WELL AS METHOD FOR THE PRODUCTION THEREOF The use of a neutral protease (NP) together with a collagenase consists in that a neutral protease which is not contained in a collagenase enzyme preparation and which is not produced by a recombinant production is mixed before the beginning of a tissue dissociation with a collagenase or a collagenase enzyme preparation with an individual dosage of the quantitative proportions of neutral protease and collagenase for improving the isolation results with respect to yield, viability and integrity of the cells.

INDUCTION HEATED SUSCEPTOR AND AEROSOL DELIVERY DEVICE An aerosol delivery device is described that includes an aerosol precursor staged within a reservoir and an atomizer configured to generate heat through induction. The atomizer has an induction transmitter and an induction receiver. The induction receiver is in operational contact with the aerosol precursor within the reservoir and is configured to wick the aerosol precursor into range of the induction transmitter to be heated and vaporized.

System integration platform for smart community The invention relates to the technical field of system integration and provides a system integration platform for a smart community. The system integration platform comprises a wireless network coverage communication system, an access control system, a resident parking system, a visitor parking system and a security and protection monitoring system, wherein the wireless network coverage communication system provides wireless network service to residents in the smart community; the access control system carries out permission identification on cars and people who come in and go out of access doors of the community and people who come in and go out of the access doors of buildings; the resident parking system intelligently guides the resident cars which enter the community and reminds car owners of parking the cars safely; the visitor parking system is used for registering the visitor car which enters the community and guides the visitor car to park in a visitor parking region; the security and protection monitoring system carries out video monitoring on all regions of the community; and a host system manages and monitors the residents, the resident car, the visitor car and people who enter the cell. The system integration platform realizes intelligent management for the community, guarantees the safe operation of the community and provides convenience for the resident.

High frequency diaphragm and voice coil assembly A high frequency drive unit comprising a dome-type diaphragm in a diaphragm and voice coil assembly. The diaphragm and voice coil assembly is particular suitable for use in compound loudspeakers with a plurality of drive units adapted to 5 reproduce different part of the audio frequency spectra and which drive units are arranged in a co-axial configuration. The diaphragm of the diaphragm and voice coil assembly according to the invention has a circular cut out at its top defining an inner periphery of the diaphragm dome. The diaphragm is suspended on its inner periphery by a top annular suspension, at the outer periphery by a outer annular 10 suspension extending outwards in a radial direction and at the outer periphery by a inner annular suspension extending inwards. Figure 1a for publication.

METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR DETECTING FIBER FAULT IN PASSIVE OPTICAL NETWORK The present invention provides a method and a system for detecting fiber fault in Passive Optical Network (PON). The system includes an optical path detection device, a Wavelength Division Multiplexing (WDM) coupler, a wavelength selection coupler, a branch fiber selector and a wavelength selection router. The detection system is attached to an original PON system, thus avoiding influence to the operation of the original system while running the detection. With the present invention, the problem of being unable to determine whether there is a fault in a branch fiber due to the loss of an optical path detection reflection signal is solved, the branch fiber with fault can be quickly located and fixed, thus reducing the operational and maintenance costs of an operator.

Systems and methods of data transmission and management Data communications systems and methods comprise a conductive media infrastructure in communication with a baseband data universe propagating at least one first signal and a broadband data universe propagating at least one second signal. At least one segmentation device is in communication with the conductive media infrastructure and partitions the broadband data universe from the baseband data universe. A coupling device is in communication with the at least one segmentation device and modulates transmission parameters of the second signal such that information travels within the broadband data universe via the conductive media infrastructure and avoids the baseband data universe. Power distribution and management systems and methods are also provided which preserve power distribution via a baseband data universe while one or more devices communicate energy data via a broadband data universe.

SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR PROVIDING AUTOMATED REAL ESTATE TRANSACTION MANAGEMENT WITH CENTRALIZED TRANSACTION INFORMATION STORAGE A system and method for providing automated real estate transaction management with centralized transaction information storage is described. Transaction information is centrally maintained and includes a plurality of transaction specifications. Each such transaction specification includes one or more deadlines that provide an agent component and a client component. An agent view is presented by interactively parsing through the transaction specification for at least one client of an agent and determining sections of the transaction information relating to the agent component. A client view is displayed by generating a hierarchy of the deadlines applicable to the real estate transaction and interactively providing select parts of the transaction information relating to the client component. Completion of the real estate transaction is dependent upon the completion of the agent component and the client component.

METHOD FOR HANDLING CONTROL OF CONGESTION STATE BASED ON ACCESS POINT NAME, AND RELATED COMMUNICATION DEVICE PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a method of starting up service by using an access point name (APN) of a wireless communication system, in a mobile device in the wireless communication system.SOLUTION: A mobile device (UE) has a plurality of connections with an APN. A method includes: a step of disconnecting at least one first connection among the plurality of connections from the APN while maintaining at least one second connection among the plurality of connections, by the mobile device (UE); and a step of starting up service using the APN after disconnection of at least one first connection from the APN. The APN is in a congestion state or an overload state.

PREDICTING SKIN AGE BASED ON THE ANALYSIS OF SKIN FLORA AND LIFESTYLE DATA The present invention relates to a combination of experimental and computational workflows that allow characterization of specific molecular mechanisms by which the microbiome contribute to skin health and skin age.

Alternative export pathways for vector expressed RNA interference The present invention is directed to nucleic acid molecules containing a loop sequence designed to circumvent exportin-5 mediated export, and methods using these novel molecules.

SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR USING A PULSE FLOW CIRCULATION FOR ALGAE CULTIVATION A device for generating a pulsed flow in a channel containing a circulating algal culture can include a plate that is pivotably mounted on the channel and an activator. A pulsed flow is generated in the channel by first positioning the plate to impede the flow of circulating algal culture and then rotating the plate to a submerged position. The pulsed flow can be employed to counteract the negative effects of bio-fouling on algae cultivation equipment. In another arrangement, a device for generating a pulsed flow in a sloped raceway that is in fluid communication with a sump can include a gate. In different embodiments, the gate can operate as a so-called "pinch gate" or as a so-called "overflow gate." In another aspect, a variable rate pump, such as a centrifugal pump, a screw pump or an airlift pump, is described for establishing a pulsed flow in a channel.
Specific eatable taste modifiers Ingestible compounds which are substantially tasteless and which have been found to be effective reducers or eliminators of undesirable tastes for eatables.

CELL CULTURE WITH OPTIMIZED METABOLISM To provide a cell whose metabolism is shifted to lactate consumption, and a method for culturing the cell.SOLUTION: One aspect of the present invention is a method for culturing a cell which includes a process of, after metabolism shift to lactate consumption in a cell occurred in first cell culture, moving the cell from the first cell culture to second cell culture. Another aspect of the present invention provides a method for culturing a cell, the method includes: a process of culturing a cell in the first cell culture; a process of determining that metabolism shift to lactate consumption in the cell occurred in the first cell culture; and a process of moving the cell to the second cell culture after the metabolism shift to lactate consumption in the cell occurred, in which lactate concentration in the second cell culture shows net lactate consumption during the second culture.SELECTED DRAWING: None

A real estate evaluation method based on machine learning The invention relates to a real estate evaluation method based on machine learning, in particular to the following steps: (1) preparing in the early stage: adopting a distributed file system for storing large data, firstly deploying a large data storage system; (2) starting the evaluation process, comparing and analyzing the information between the real estate to be evaluated and the database through the big data analysis and data mining analysis technology to identify the characteristics of the real estate; (3) according to the characteristic system of the immovable property obtained in the step (2), automatically matching the evaluation methods to be used from a plurality of evaluation methods, selecting the evaluation methods, referring to the reference factors of the comparison data, and calculating and giving the final evaluation value according to the calculation formula; at the same time, the appraisal process will be completed after the real estate information and operation experience of the appraisal being stored in the learning achievement database and database. Based on computer machine learning, continuous learning, and accumulating the results of the database information, the reference factors of evaluation calculation are optimized, so that the evaluation results more scientific and objective.

AEROSOL GENERATION DEVICE To provide an aerosol generation device with a structure cannot be disassembled by users as they like.SOLUTION: An aerosol generation device comprises: a case 1100a, b in which a heater 1030 to heat a cigarette is installed; a bracket 1200 to support a component installed in the case; a fastening member 1300 to fasten the case and the bracket together; and a cap 1400 mounted on an outside surface of the case to conceal the fastening member inside the case, where the cap cannot be separated after the mounting.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 8

METHOD FOR PRODUCING FATS, ADVANTAGEOUSLY BUTTERFATS, OF DECREASED CHOLESTEROL CONTENT AND APPARATUS FOR PRODUCING THESE FATS In a process for producing low-cholesterol butter fat or butter by steam treatment, the fat is treated with steam in one or more horizontal or slightly inclined reaction pipes at a temperature of 195 to 250 DEG C and a pressure of 0.5 to 5 mbar. The steam is injected through steam-outlet holes in the walls of mutually parallel steam pipes which extend through the layer that conducts the liquid fat (oil) along the whole length of the reaction pipe parallel to the axis of the pipe. The vapour is removed and the fat, to which fat recombination substances may be added, is cooled. The low-cholesterol butter fat of butter can be readily obtained in an installation which contains several reaction pipes, and can be advantageously used to manufacture foods and luxury foodstuffs, in particular for dietetic products, or consumed or processed directly as a dietary fat.

METHODS AND COMPOSITIONS FOR ISOTHERMAL DNA AMPLIFICATION The invention relates to methods for amplifying a DNA template, comprising incubating the DNA template with a DNA-dependent RNA polymerase in the presence of ribonucleotides and amplifying the DNA template by a strand- displacing DNA polymerase. The invention further relates to the use of a RNA polymerase for generating a ribonucleotide primer on a DNA template, followed by amplification of the DNA template by a strand-displacing DNA polymerase, to a kit of parts, comprising a RNA polymerase and a strand-displacing DNA-dependent DNA polymerase, and to the use of the kit of parts for amplification of a DNA template.

An electronic appliance control apparatus. A power controlling apparatus turns off a power to an apparatus whose connection to a central apparatus has been cut by a connection change, thus selectively turning off a power to an apparatus not required by the central apparatus. A locking/unlocking apparatus determines a value of the locking timer in the interrupt timer routine and, when the value has exceeded a predetermined level, takes a slave apparatus out of the locked state, thereby simplifying programming. <IMAGE>
