Method and apparatus for data transmission in a well using a flexible line with stiffener PCT No. PCT/US86/00263 Sec. 371 Date Oct. 7, 1987 Sec. 102(e) Date Oct. 7, 1987 PCT Filed Feb. 7, 1986 PCT Pub. No. WO87/04755 PCT Pub. Date Aug. 13, 1987.A method and means is provided for receiving and passing data up hole to the top (22) of a well bore (20a) while passing fracturing fluid (54,60) down hole to a geological formation (44) at a zone (29) in the well bore. A flexible line (36) has suspended thereform, a receiver (34) for receiving data signals from a separate sensor (30) and transmitter (28), and a stiffener (32). The stiffener is positioned up the well bore from a lower extremity (29b) of the receiver. The flexible line is adapted for passing data signals representing a parameter represented by the received data signals up to the top (22) of the well bore.

Wireless device and wireless base station device To provide a useful technique for constructing a wireless device as a networking wireless device. A networking wireless device connected to a first node via a first link and connected to a second node via a second link comprises: a first frame processing unit which constructs and deconstructs layer 1 frames flowing in the first link and is provided with a first port capable of inputting/outputting layer 2 frames; a second frame processing unit which constructs and deconstructs layer 1 frames flowing in the second link and is provided with a second port capable of inputting/outputting layer 2 frames; and a control unit which controls the wireless device and is provided with a control port capable of inputting/outputting layer 2 frames. The layer 2 frames are distributed by a layer 2 switch.

Methods for increasing the production of ethanol from microbial fermentation A stable continuous method for producing ethanol from the anaerobic bacterial fermentation of a gaseous substrate containing at least one reducing gas involves culturing in a fermentation bioreactor anaerobic, acetogenic bacteria in a liquid nutrient medium; supplying the gaseous substrate to the bioreactor; and manipulating the bacteria in the bioreactor by reducing the redox potential, or increasing the NAD(P)H TO NAD(P) ratio, in the fermentation broth after the bacteria achieves a steady state and stable cell concentration in the bioreactor. The free acetic acid concentration in the bioreactor is maintained at less than 5 g/L free acid. This method allows ethanol to be produced in the fermentation broth in the bioreactor at a productivity of greater than 10 g/L per day. Both ethanol and acetate are produced in a ratio of ethanol to acetate ranging from 1:1 to 20:1.

METHOD AND TERMINAL FOR SEARCHING FOR AN ACCESS POINT Specifically, according to one embodiment of the present invention, a method for searching for an access point is provided. The method for searching may comprise the steps of: a terminal measuring the position thereof; checking an access point located near the measured position of the terminal; determining whether or not the distance between the terminal and the access point is greater than the radius range searchable by the terminal; and searching for the access point when the distance between the terminal and the access point is less than the radius range.

COMPOSITIONS FOR THE TREATMENT OF INFLAMMATION IN THE BRAIN AND OTHER TISSUES Methods of treating a patient who is predisposed to Alzheimer's Disease (AD) are disclosed. The methods include providing a patient determined to be predisposed t AD; and administering to the patient a therapeutically effective amount of an anti¬ inflammatory agent. The agent is preferably a TNFa inhibitor administered via a recombinant adenoviral-associated viral (rAAV) vector, by an intraparenchymal injection.

Jelly health foods containing odorless garlic and process for manufacturing same Odorless garlic, which is obtained by cooking whole or peeled garlic under pressure, impasting the cooked garlic and treating the impasted garlic with the juice of citrus and honey respectively to deodorize garlic, a pro- cess for manufacturing the odorless garlic, jelly health foods containing the odorless garlic and a process for manufacturing the jelly health foods containing the odorless garlic.

METHODS FOR OBTAINING POSITIVE TRANSFORMANTS OF A FILAMENTOUS FUNGAL HOST CELL The present invention relates to methods for obtaining positive transformants of a filamentous fungal host cell, comprising: transforming a tandem construct into a population of cells of the filamentous fungal host a tandem construct and isolating a transformant of the filamentous fungal host cell comprising the tandem construct. The present invention also relates to such tandem constructs, filamentous fungal host cells comprising such tandem constructs, and methods of producing multiple recombinant proteins.

Subsea wellhead assembly A subsea wellhead assembly is provided. The subsea wellhead assembly comprises: a conductor; a subsea wellhead; and subsea riser system equipment mounted on the subsea wellhead; wherein the subsea riser system equipment is connected to the conductor such that forces can be transmitted from the subsea riser equipment to the conductor.

Process for Excavating Shafts, Tunnels and the like. 20,778. Koepe, F. Oct. 2. Drawings to Specification. Excavating.-A process for excavating harbours, channels, sluices, and the like in watery ground consists in combining the petrifying process with the freezing process. The petrifying process may be first applied and practically completed, and then the freezing process applied, or the processes may be applied several times alternately.

Property problem feedback system The invention discloses a property problem feedback system. The system comprises a feedback module, a browse module, an attention module, a strategy module and a satisfaction module. An output end of the feedback module is connected with the browse module. An output end of the browse module is connected with the attention module. An output end of the attention module is connected with the strategy module. An output end of the strategy module is connected with the satisfaction module. The attention module comprises an attention display unit, an attention unit, a questioning module and a tracking module. By means of the above mode, the property problem feedback system has the advantages that the structure is novel, the operation is simple, the management is uniform, the recording is electronic, the problem is fed back publically, the universality and the severity of the problem are reflected by using the attention, the problem solving timely degree of the property is supervised by using the strategy module, the convenience and the practicality are good, and the property problem feedback system has a wide market prospect.

OLIGONUCLEOTIDE MODULATION OF PROTEIN KINASE C 2132094 9319203 PCTABS00025 Compositions and methods are provided for the treatment and diagnosis of diseases associated with protein kinase C. Oligonucleotides are provided which are specifically hybridizable with nucleic acids encoding PKC. Oligonucleotides specifically hybridizable with a translation initiation site, 5'-untranslated region or 3' untranslated region are provided. Oligonucleotides specifically hybridizable with a particular PKC isozyme or set of isozymes are also provided. Methods of treating animals suffering from disease amenable to therapeutic intervention by modulating protein kinase C expression with an oligonucleotide specifically hybridizable with RNA or DNA corresponding to PKC are disclosed.

AN ELECTRONIC APPLIANCE CONTROL APPARATUS A power controlling apparatus turns off a power to an apparatus whose connection to a central apparatus has been cut by a connection change, thus selectively turning off a power to an apparatus not required by the central apparatus. A locking/unlocking apparatus determines a value of the locking timer in the interrupt timer routine and, when the value has exceeded a predetermined level, takes a slave apparatus out of the locked state, thereby simplifying programming.

KNOTTED MESH AS SUPPORTING MATERIAL IN MINES A method for lining mining and tunnel constructions with a support material (20) comprises the steps of: • a. providing a plurality of lay wires (24) in the long direction; • b. providing a plurality of stay wires (22) in the cross direction, the stay wires making intersections with said lay wires (24); • c. providing knot wires (28) to attach the lay wires (24) to the stay wires (22) in at least some of the intersections so as to form the support material; • d. installing the support material (20) against a ceiling or a wall of a mining or tunnel construction by means of bolts.
BURSOPOIETIN A synthetic peptide which possesses the ability to specifically induce the differentiation of precursor B cells into mature B-cells capable of producing antibody.

SYNGAP1 DYSFUNCTIONS AND USES THEREOF IN DIAGNOSTIC AND THERAPEUTIC APPLICATIONS FOR MENTAL RETARDATION The invention identifies Syngap1 dysfunctions as causative of mental retardation. Described are methods of detecting mental retarda-tion and methods of detecting non- syndromic mental retardation (NSMR) in a human subject. Particular methods comprise sequencing a human sub-ject's genomic DNA for comparison with a control sequence from an unaf-fected individual. Also described are probes, kits, antibodies and isolated mutated Syngap1 proteins.

LIVE WELL STAGED INSTALLATION OF WET CONNECTED ESP AND RELATED METHOD An ESP assembly is broken into subassemblies to fit through a lubricator for live well deployment. A lifting device has a shaft transmission feature and associated housing rotational lock for use at the top of the first subassembly and to be left in position for engagement of the next assembly. The subassemblies can be delivered on wireline or slickline. A wet connect can be at the lower end of the initial subassembly to connect to a cable run alongside the production tubing. The ESP subassemblies all are interconnected in the live well and function as they would if assembled at the surface. The ability to break down the assembly and run it in segments lets the components fit through a length limited lubricator for live well deployment.

Modified HEVC level coding of video data Methods and devices for reconstructing coefficient levels from a bitstream of encoded video data for a coefficient group in a transform unit, and corresponding methods and devices for encoding are provided. The method of reconstructing includes, for each of the non-zero coefficients in the coefficient group, in scan order, decoding a greater-than-one flag for that non-zero coefficient if fewer than two previously-decoded greater-than-one flags for that coefficient group are equal to one. The coefficient levels for the non-zero coefficients are reconstructed based, at least in part, upon the decoded greater-than-one flags.
BURSOPOIETIN A synthetic peptide which possesses the ability to specifically induce the differentiation of precursor B cells into mature B-cells capable of producing antibody.

A device for rate matching bits in a code division multiple access wireless communication system The invention includes various embodiments for use in physical layer processing. One embodiment determines the address mapping of bits in the physical channel buffer form the address of bits in the first interleaver buffer. The physical channel buffer addresses are determined corresponding to addresses of the bits after rate matching, bit scrambling, second interleaving and physical channel mapping. The bits are directly read from the first interleaver buffer and written to the physical channel buffer using the determined physical channel buffer addresses. Another embodiment determines the address mapping of bits in the first interleaver buffer from the address of bits in the physical channel buffer. The first interleaver buffer addresses are determined corresponding to addresses of the bits after reverse rate matching, reverse bit scrambling, reverse second interleaving and reverse physical channel mapping. The bits are directly read from the determined first interleaver buffer addresses and written to the physical channel buffer addresses.

PREDICTING COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT TRENDS Community development is supported by a community rating. Community ratings for various communities are compared to identify a preferred community. Historical community ratings are determined for the preferred community. Community rating trends are identified for the community and these trends are used for predicting future community rating(s) to support development decisions.

Rotary steerable motor system for underground drilling A preferred embodiment of a system for rotating and guiding a drill bit in an underground bore includes a drilling motor and a drive shaft coupled to drilling motor so that drill bit can be rotated by the drilling motor. The system further includes a guidance module having an actuating arm movable between an extended position wherein the actuating arm can contact a surface of the bore and thereby exert a force on the housing of the guidance module, and a retracted position.

Method, apparatus, and system for voice call fallback to circuit switched domain A method for voice call fallback to a circuit switched (CS) domain disclosed in the present invention includes: receiving a Service Request message from a calling user equipment (UE), where the Service Request message includes called number information of a voice call in a CS domain, instructing an evolved NodeB (eNB) to initiate circuit switched fallback (CSFB) handover; receiving a Handover Request message from the eNB, where the Handover Request message includes information required for CS handover, selecting a mobile switching center (MSC) and sending a packet switched (PS) to CS Handover Request message to the MSC, where the PS to CS Handover Request message carries information required for the CS handover and a called number so that the MSC calls a called UE. The corresponding apparatuses and systems are also disclosed. The technical solution of the present invention can reduce the connection delay.

AEROSOL PROVISION SYSTEM An aerosol provision system comprising: a liquid storage area comprising a liquid formulation; an aerosol generating area; a membrane disposed between the liquid storage area and the aerosol generating area, said membrane fluidly communicating the liquid storage area with the aerosol generating area; wherein the liquid formulation has a water content of at least 18 pcnt w/w.

System and method for communicating media signals A media streaming system for streaming media signals is provided. The media streaming system takes a library of separate and distinct CODECs (145) that are provided as a searchable CODEC library and used in determining specific characteristics in the media signal to identify similar sections of the signal. The media streaming system uses a computer implemented intelligence system, such as an intelligence mechanism to learn and capture the unique charateristics of a signal as the signal is being streamed (150). The media streaming system also compresses and decompresses the media signal as the signals are streamed from a source media (100) to a destination device (130, 135, 140).

HERBICIDE-RESISTANT AHAS-MUTANTS AND METHODS OF USE PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide transgenic or non-transgenic plants having an improved level of tolerance to acetohydroxyacid synthase(AHAS)-inhibiting herbicides.SOLUTION: The invention provides a plant tolerant to AHAS-inhibiting herbicides having in its genome at least one copy of an isolated nucleic acid, a recombinant nucleic acid molecule or a mutagenized or synthesized nucleic acid molecule, encoding a Brassica acetohydroxyacid synthase large subunit (AHASL) protein mutated at specified amino acid positions corresponding to A122 and S653 of a specified sequence.

Apparatus for stretching plastic dough An apparatus for stretching plastic dough is provided. A plurality of conveyors arranged in series and a plurality of rollers disposed above the conveyors cooperatively act to stretch dough fed therebetween. The plurality of rollers are freely rotatable and the shafts thereof are fixed to connecting arms which can reciprocate above the conveyors to make the dough less thick.

Convenient-to-build communication base station with weeding function The invention relates to a convenient-to-build communication base station with a weeding function. The communication base station comprises a base seat, a supporting mechanism, a microwave emitter anda weeding mechanism, wherein the supporting mechanism comprises two supporting components; each the supporting component comprises a driving unit, a top plate and three lifting units; the driving units comprise first motors and driving gears; the lifting units comprise driven gears, bearings, screw rods and sleeves; the weeding mechanism comprises a medicine storage box, a high-pressure pump, a spray pipe, a spray head and a surrounding component; and the surrounding component comprises a second motor, a rotary wheel, a fixing block and a connecting rod. According to the convenient-to-build communication base station with the weeding function, the microwave emitter is lifted through the supporting mechanism, so that workers are not needed to build a transmitting tower, and maintenance isfacilitated. In addition, herbicides are sprayed around through the weeding mechanism, so that the growth of surrounding vegetation is inhibited, and the practicability is improved.

Template-directed assembly of receptor signaling complexes Transmembrane receptors in the signaling pathways of bacterial chemotaxis systems influence cell motility by forming noncovalent complexes with the cytoplasmic signaling proteins to regulate their activity. The requirements for receptor-mediated activation of CheA, the principal kinase of the Escherichia coli chemotaxis signaling pathway, can be demonstrated using self-assembled clusters of a receptor fragment (CF) derived from the cytoplasmic domain of the aspartate receptor, Tar. Histidine-tagged Tar CF can be assembled on the surface of unilamellar vesicles via a lipid containing the Nickel-nitrilotriacetic acid moiety as a headgroup. The stability of such a complex can be controlled by the properties of the template including the size and composition, which can be used, for example, to vary the 2-dimensional concentration of receptor fragments. Surface-assembled CF is also found to serve as a substrate for receptor methylation, which is catalyzed by the receptor transferase. Since neither CheA activation nor CF methylation is observed in comparable samples in the absence of vesicles, it is concluded that surface-templating generates the organization among CF subunits required for biochemical activity.

Arrangement and method relating to digital communication systems An arrangement and a method for multiplexing/demultiplexing in a digital communication system using time division multiplex. The arrangement includes a switching arrangement with a first switching device for switching data and second switching devices for multiplexing and/or demultiplexing data. One or more second switching devices are connected to the first switching device over terminal connection links including a logical interface which includes a number of time slots arranged in rows and columns. The arrangement further includes a device for providing resources on the interface of the first terminal connection link. Resources for at least two different functionalities are reserved using reservation of resources based on columns in the interface and reservation based on time slots in the interface, respectively.

COMBINED NITROGEN GENERATION SYSTEM AND WELL SERVICING FLUID SYSTEM IN ONE POWER UNIT APPARATUS. A combined system for treating an oil and/or gas well, comprising: a single transportation means having mounted thereon: a single prime mover for providing prime power for the operation of pumps and motors mounted on said transportation means; a nitrogen generator that can gather gaseous nitrogen from the earth's atmosphere; and a fluid pumping system for pumping fluids into a wellbore, said nitrogen generator and said fluid pumping system being interconnectable by plumbing and including a power transmission means responsive to the operation of said engine.

MULTILAYERED BALL SEALER AND METHOD OF USE THEREOF A multilayered ball sealer having a deformable layer. The multilayered ball sealer has an outer or intermediate layer that is deformable under pressure. In the former, the deformable layer may be water-soluble or hydrolysable. In the latter, the outer layer is a sheath that contains the deformable layer and adapts to its shape. A multilayered ball sealer may be used as a diversion agent by being suspended in a fluid injected into a wellbore and applying pressure to deform the shape of the intermediate layer such that the multilayered ball sealer adapts to the shape of a perforation opening on which the multilayered ball sealer has seated.

METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR RECEIVING DIGITAL TELEVISION BROADCAST DATA PURPOSE: A method and a device for receiving digital television broadcast data are provided to turn an RF receiving unit off when service frames corresponding to an undesired service are received, thereby saving power. CONSTITUTION: Service configuration information showing a broadcast service corresponding to at least one service frame is received(S110). A frame number of a service frame corresponding to a desired broadcast service is obtained based on the service configuration information(S140). Only the service frame corresponding to the desired broadcast service is processed using the frame number(S160). An RF device for receiving the service frame is turned off while a service frame not corresponding to the desired service is transmitted.

leasing index calculating method Disclosed is a method for calculating a lease index. The method comprises: a zone classification step of allocating a plurality of tax invoices to one of predetermined zones based on business addresses of rent-related tax invoices; a usage classification step of allocating the plurality of tax invoices to one real estate usages, respectively, based on the usage of leased property that the lease related to the rent has occurred; and a lease index calculation step of calculating a rental index for a pair of a first zone and a first real estate usage based on the amounts of one set of tax invoices allocated to the first zone among the one or more zones and the first real estate usage among the one or more real estate usages.

WELLBORE FORMATION EVALUATION SYSTEM AND METHOD A formation evaluation tool positionable in a wellbore penetrating a subterranean formation is provided. The formation evaluation tool includes a cooling syst em adapted to pass a cooling fluid near electronics in the formation evaluation tool whereby heat is dissipated therefrom, the electronics has at least one gauge, a fluid communication device having an inlet adapted to receive the formation fluid and a flowline operatively connected to the fluid communication device and the gauge for placing the formation fluid in fluid communication therewith whereby properties of the formation fluid are determined. The formation evaluation tool may also be provided with a plurality of sample chambers operatively connected to the flowline for collecting at least a portion of the formation fluid and a pressure compensator in fluid communication with the wellbore and operatively connected to the plurality of sample chambers for applying pressure to the sample chambers whereby pressure is balanced therebetween.

DEVICE AND METHOD FOR CONTROLLING THE BEGINNING OF A TOOL OPERATION IN FISH TREATMENT MACHINE The invention relates to fish treatment machines which operate with a guidin g element for the fish, in the form of a chisel (20) introduced into the anal orifice of the animal, whereby the correct functioning of the downstream too l (21) depends on the correct positioning of said chisel. The aim of the invention is to avoid damage to the fish due to incorrect positioning of the chisel/fish and to guarantee correct positioning of the fish with regard to the tool. The chisel is assigned a monitoring device (30) comprising a senso r (31) for the positioning of the chisel/fish, a computer (32) for comparing t he desired and and real values with respect to the sensor values in addition to comprising an actuation device for the tool impinged upon by signals emitted by the computer. The sensor (31) can be a transmitting/receiving device whic h comprises a light source (312) and a light guide (311).

Dielectric chip antennas An antenna comprises at least first and second conductive radiating elements 2, 3 each having an end portion 5, 6 connected to ground and each second end providing a respective metallised surface region 8 of a dielectric block 7. The radiating elements 2, 3 are parasitic and are driven by being capacitively coupled to at least one further radiating element 10. The radiating elements 2, 3 are conductive tracks formed on the substrate of a printed circuit board. The further radiating element 10 is spaced from the dielectric block 7 and may be a monopole antenna. The dielectric block 7 may be a ceramic material component which is surface mounted on to the said circuit board. The radiating elements 2, 3 & 10 may each operate in the same or different frequency bands. The radiating elements 2, 3 may include series inductance elements and/or optional short circuit shunts formed across certain portions of the said elements.

Protease variants and compositions Enzymes produced by mutating the genes for a number of subtilases and expressing the mutated genes in suitable hosts are presented.The enzymes exhibit improved wash performance in any detergent in comparison to their wild type parent enzymes.

Method and apparatus for investigating subsurface conditions A method and apparatus for investigating subsurface ground of a site to obtain and store information about soil conditions by pushing into the ground a cableless unit that includes a memory storage device able to collect the information throughout the whole investigation process. After completion of the process, the memory storage device is lifted up to the surface of the ground and is connected to a data processing unit located on the ground to extract the collected information on soil conditions.

METHOD FOR PRODUCING OLIGOSACCHARIDE CHITOSAN AND OLIGOSACCHARIDE CHITOSAN The invention relates to a method for producing oligosaccharide chitosan and to an oligosaccharide chitosan and can be used for the medical, cosmetic and food industries. The aim of said invention is to develop a method for producing oligosaccharide chitosan and said oligosaccharide chitosan it self. The inventive oligosaccharide chitosan is characterised in that the broad-spectrum ion-bound derivatives thereof make it possible to provide a finished product with additional properties and to ensure the stability of said properties during further use. Said aim is attained by the inventive method for producing oligosaccharide chitosan consisting in carrying out a fermentative oligomerisation of chitosan in the presence of papain and acetic acid, spay drying the thus fermentatively oligomerised product and, afterwards additionally dissolving the thus obtained product in water at least two times and, subsequently in spray-drying it again. The thus transformed product is disolved in water together with substances which contain acid groups, and a salt bonding of the oligosaccharide chitosan is carried out during a solvent process which is carried out until the ion-bound derivatives of the oligosaccharide chitosan are obtained and, afterwards are dried again. The aim is also attained by producing an oligosaccharide chitosan containing an ion-bound acetic acid and additionally containing at least one type of an ion-bound substance comprising acid groups. The inventive oligosaccharide chitosan contains 57.0-92.0 mass % oligosaccharide chitosan, 2.3-3.7 mass % ion-bound acetic acid, the rest being ion-bound substance comprising acid groups.

Mining machine position tracking and mapping A system for determining a position of a mining machine in an underground mine, the system including an emitter unit and a receiver unit, one of the units being positioned in fixed relation to a mine wall and the other unit being mounted relative to the machine, wherein the emitter unit transmits a coded magnetic signal that is received by the receiver unit, the system further including a processor to identify the distance and relative angle between the units based on the received signal. The system utilizes ranging of a through strata coded low frequency magnetic field for real time and continuous 3-D positioning of the mining machine. The invention also relates to a method of tracking a mining machine and a mining operation. 7 6 _ L Y ' 20 12(

Purifying growth hormone-like materials A process is provided for separating impurities from an impure mixture containing growth hormone-like material, which comprises: (1) applying said mixture to a reverse phase macroporous acryulate ester copolymer resin support at a pH of from about 7 to about 9; and (2) eluting said growth hormone-like material from said support with an aqueous eluant having a pH of from about 7 to about 9 and containing from about 20% to about 80% by volume of an organic diluent selected from the group consisting of acetone, acetonitrile, and a combination of acetone and acetonitrile.

System and method for three-dimensional video coding Systems and methods are provided for receiving and encoding 3D video. The receiving method comprises: accepting a bitstream with a current video frame encoded with two interlaced fields, in a MPEG-2, MPEG-4, or H.264 standard; decoding a current frame top field; decoding a current frame bottom field; and, presenting the decoded top and bottom fields as a 3D frame image. In some aspects, the method presents the decoded top and bottom fields as a stereo-view image. In other aspects, the method accepts 2D selection commands in response to a trigger such as receiving a supplemental enhancement information (SEI) message, an analysis of display capabilities, manual selection, or receiver system configuration. Then, only one of the current frame interlaced fields is decoded, and a 2D frame image is presented.

A PROCESS FOR A STABLE PRODUCING ETHANOL A stable continuous method for producing ethanol from the anaerobic bacterial fermentation of a gaseous substrate containing at least one reducing gas involves culturing a fermentation bioreactor anaerobic, acetogenic bacteria In a liquid nutrient medium; supplying the gaseous substrate to the bioreactor; and manipulating the bacteria in the bioreactor by reducing the redox potential, or increasing the NAD(P)H to NAD(P) ratio, in the fermentation broth after the bacteria achieve a steady slate and stable cell concentration in the bioreactor. The free acetic acid concentration in the bioreactor is maintained at less than 5 g/L free acid. This method allows ethanol to be produced in the fermentation broth in the bioreactor at productivity greater than 10g/L per day. Both ethanol and acetate are produced in a ratio of ethanol to acetate ranging from 1:1 to 20:1.
COMPOSITIONS AND METHODS FOR TREATING LEUKEMIA Treatment of acute myeloid leukemia with an agent that inhibits BRD4 is disclosed.

Physical layer processing for a wireless communication system using code division multiple access background The invention includes various embodiments for use in physical layer processing. One embodiment determines the address mapping of bits in the physical channel buffer from the address of bits in the first interleaver buffer. The physical channel buffer addresses are determined corresponding to addresses of the bits after rate matching, bit scrambling, second interleaving and physical channel mapping. The bits are directly read from the first interleaver buffer and written to the physical channel buffer using the determined physical channel buffer addresses. Another embodiment determines the address mapping of bits in the first interleaver buffer from the address of bits in the physical channel buffer. The first interleaver buffer addresses are determined corresponding to addresses of the bits after reverse rate matching, reverse bit scrambling, reverse second interleaving and reverse physical channel mapping. The bits are directly read from the determined first interleaver buffer addresses and written to the physical channel buffer addresses.

HIGH FUNCTIONAL WATER CONTAINING TITANIUM AND METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PRODUCING THE SAME This invention provides a method and apparatus for manufacturing titanium-dissolved water with molten titanium dissolved therein, the molten titanium being titanium metal melted by the combustion gas resulting from the combustion of a mixed gas of oxygen and hydrogen in high-pressure water, as well as the resultant titanium-dissolved water and health articles, medical articles and cosmetics utilizing the physiologically activating effect of the high-function water containing titanium.

Multi-segment filter tube The present invention relates to a filter tube, the filter tube comprising an empty paper tube and a filter attached to the empty paper tube, wherein the filter comprises a first filter segment, a second filter segment and a third filter segment, wherein the first filter segment is located at the mouth end of the filter tube, the second filter segment is located upstream of the second filter segment and the third filter segment is located upstream of the second filter segment. The invention further concerns a method of making such a filter tube. The filter tube is suitable for make-your-own cigarettes.

PARTICULATE DISPENSER Particulate dispenser can include a housing enclosing a receiving space. The housing having a fluid inlet aperture and a particulate input aperture, and a fluid outlet aperture. A hopper can be disposed above the housing and coupled to feed particulate from the hopper to the particulate input aperture. A wheel disposed within in the receiving space having at least one distribution aperture extending from the top surface to the bottom surface. The apertures being disposed at respective positions so that rotation of the wheel alternately aligns the distribution aperture with the particulate input aperture to feed particulate from the particulate input aperture into the distribution aperture and then aligns the distribution aperture with the fluid input aperture and the fluid output aperture to feed the particulate from the distribution aperture into the fluid flowing through the distribution aperture as the wheel rotates.

METHOD AND DEVICE FOR CONTROLLING AT LEAST ONE DRILLING PARAMETER FOR ROCK DRILLING The present invention relates to a method and a device for controlling at least one drilling parameter when drilling into rock with a drilling machine, where a percussion pressure and/or a feed pressure of the drilling machine, which generate a percussive force and a feed force respectively, are controlled during the drilling operation. A parameter value is determined that represents the mean value of a damping pressure in a damping chamber used both for transmitting a feed force to a drill string that is connected to the drilling machine, and for damping rock reflections from this drill string; a difference between the said mean value of the determined damping pressure and a reference value of the damping pressure is also determined. The percussion pressure and/or the feed pressure of the drilling machine is then controlled on the basis of this difference.

Assisting the selection of a colour for a picture surround The present invention provides a method and apparatus for assisting the selection of a colour for a picture surround. The invention is based upon the use of a camera 10, preferably a video camera, a digital processor 14 and a video monitor 12. The digital processor 14 is operable to control the production of a display comprising a picture as viewed by the camera 10 and a picture surround. A key pad 16, in association with processor 14, is used to vary the colour of the picture surround 26 so that the aesthetic appeal of various colours for the surround 26 relative to the picture 22 can be assessed. Preferably the system is arranged so as to display upon monitor 12 a plurality of display areas 24-30 which represent a picture trim, a picture mount, a picture frame and the background against which the picture is to be positioned. This enables the aesthetic appeal to be assessed for various combinations of colours for the picture trim, mount and surround relative to the picture and the background. <IMAGE>

Intersection signal lamp device The invention provides an intersection signal lamp device. The intersection signal lamp device comprises a signal lamp system and a variable message sign device. The signal lamp system is mounted at an intersection. The variable message sign device is mounted at an upstream position in a driving direction with a certain distance to the intersection and is used for prompting a driver to change a lane before entering into an intersection channelized road. The signal lamp system adjusts driving direction indication condition of a current road and an intersection signal lamp control ratio according to road traffic environment change condition and displays the intersection signal lamp control ratio at the intersection. The signal lamp system also displays passage permission information of eachdriving direction of the current road. The signal lamp system sends the driving direction indication condition of the current road to the variable message sign device, and the variable message sign device displays the driving direction indication condition of the current road at the upstream position in the driving direction with the certain distance to the intersection.

ELECTRONIC DOCUMENT FOR REAL ESTATE TRANSACTION FORM, SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR OPERATING ELECTRONIC DOCUMENT FOR TRANSACTIONS IN REAL ESTATE, OPERATING DEVICES FOR TRANSACTIONS IN REAL ESTATE AND RECORDING MEDIUM An electronic real estate transaction document form, a system, a method, and a device for operating an electronic real estate transaction document, and a program recording medium thereof are provided to generate and safely distribute the electronic real estate transaction document to a receiver side by using real estate transaction information stored in a database. The database stores real estate information and real estate transaction information. A storing part(120) stores statement item information of each electronic real estate transaction document form and corresponding to document form. An information checker checks a kind of the electronic real estate transaction document provided to a terminal using and/or requesting the electronic real estate transaction document. A document generator(145) generates the electronic real estate transaction document by checking the statement item information, reading the document form matched with the kind of the electronic real estate transaction document, and using the real estate information and the real estate transaction information matched with the statement item information.

System for comparative information at maintenance cost and consulting In accordance with the present invention, a building management cost comparison and consulting system comprises: a client information server storing information of a client and connected with a service providing server; and a service providing server transmitting and receiving information with a public data portal server through the Internet, and allowing a plurality of clients to transmit and receive information through wired or wireless access thereto. Thus, when a client accesses the service providing server and inputs the address, area and monthly management fee information of a building, the service providing server accesses the public data portal server to acquire information of buildings in the vicinity of the address and monthly management fee information through an API, and then, the service providing server compares an average monthly management fee of the buildings received from the public data portal server with the monthly management fee inputted by the client to generate a result report grading how high the average monthly management fee and the monthly management fee of the client are and transmit the same to the client, and then, the service providing server generates a management fee estimate calculated from an average management fee of a local government corresponding to the address of the building through the API from the public data portal server to transmit the same to the client, and then, the service providing server outputs items related with the maintenance and management of the building onto a screen of the client, and, here, if the client selects items which the client wants to be estimated and inputs text content which the client wants to be estimated, the service providing server transmits information of a management business corresponding to the items selected by the client from a management business list and transmits the text content inputted by the client for an estimate to the management business.
SYNTHETIC ANTIBODIES AGAINST VEGF AND THEIR USES The invention provides novel synthetic antibodies directed against VEGF and uses thereof.

PROCESS FOR PREPARING CHOLESTEROL REDUCED BUTTERFAT OR BUTTER, BUTTER (FAT) OBTAINED THEREFROM, AS WELL AS APPARATUS FOR ITS PREPARATION In a process for producing low-cholesterol butter fat or butter by steam treatment, the fat is treated with steam in one or more horizontal or slightly inclined reaction pipes at a temperature of 195 to 250 DEG C and a pressure of 0.5 to 5 mbar. The steam is injected through steam-outlet holes in the walls of mutually parallel steam pipes which extend through the layer that conducts the liquid fat (oil) along the whole length of the reaction pipe parallel to the axis of the pipe. The vapour is removed and the fat, to which fat recombination substances may be added, is cooled. The low-cholesterol butter fat of butter can be readily obtained in an installation which contains several reaction pipes, and can be advantageously used to manufacture foods and luxury foodstuffs, in particular for dietetic products, or consumed or processed directly as a dietary fat.

Distribution system and data operation method thereof The invention discloses a distribution system and a data operation method thereof. The system comprises a client, a main node, a plurality of storing nodes and a plurality of computing nodes. The client is used for sending data operation request to the main node, the main node is used for responding request of the client to obtain a storing node list and transmitting the storing node list to the client, the plurality of storing nodes are used for storing data required by the client to be operated, and the plurality of computing nodes are used for executing computing tasks distributed by the main node according to data operation request of the users. When the main node obtains the storing node list, a transcript position selecting strategy is used to select the storing nodes corresponding to the data transcript. The transcript position selecting strategy includes at least one of the following methods: selecting the storing nodes with small volume load, selecting the computing nodes with small computing load; and selecting the storing nodes with poor locality.

SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR THREE-DIMENSIONAL VIDEO CODING

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide systems and methods for receiving and encoding three-dimensional 3D video.

SOLUTION: The receiving method includes steps of: accepting a bitstream with a current video frame encoded with two interlaced fields, in a MPEG-2, MPEG-4 or H.264 standard; decoding a current frame top field; decoding a current frame bottom field; and presenting the decoded top and bottom fields as a 3D frame image. In some aspects, the method presents the decoded top and bottom fields as a stereo-view image. In other aspects, the method accepts 2D selection commands 112 in response to a trigger such as receiving a supplemental enhancement information (SEI) message, an analysis of display capabilities, manual selection or receiver system configuration. Then, only one of the current frame interlaced fields is decoded, and a 2D frame image is presented.

UNDERSEA PACKAGE AND INSTALLATION SYSTEM PCT No. PCT/GB90/00292 Sec. 371 Date Nov. 28, 1990 Sec. 102(e) Date Nov. 28, 1990 PCT Filed Feb. 23, 1990 PCT Pub. No. WO90/10139 PCT Pub. Date Sep. 7, 1990.An operational package comprising either a pump/driver package (1; 100) or a valve package (250) is retrievably installed at a subsea station by a receptacle (10; 110; 251). Co-operating connection means on the package and the receptacle establish fluid and/or electrical connection between the package and the receptacle on reception of the package within the receptacle. Seal means (14) carried by the package are moved into a condition to seal any such fluid connections. Installation is effected by establishing a running loop extending from a surface vessel downwardly through the receptacle (10; 110) and upwardly to the surface vessel outside the receptacle, the package (1; 100) being moved on and guided by the wire loop from the surface vessel into the receptacle. Alternatively, a handling tool (120) is employed with co-operating releasable connecting means (151) on the handling tool and the receptacle, and operating means (124, 125) operable between the handling tool and the package to effect movement of the package inwardly of the receptacle, after connection of the connecting means.

DIRECT TRANSACTION PROFIT SHARING SYSTEM FOR THE REAL ESTATE RENTAL A system for sharing profit of direct real-estate rental transaction is provided to prevent time/expense for checking a false rental real-estate and prevent illegal activity applied to a tenant from a malicious realtor or landlord by using a true real-estate verification system. A landlord registers free rental AD(ADvertisement) to a direct real-estate rental transaction website by using a true owner verification system automatically blocking registration of a false landlord. A tenant searches real-estate and makes a rental contract with the landlord in the system. The direct real-estate rental transaction website claims a successful AD charge to the landlord and provides the tenant with a part smaller than the half of the charge received from the landlord as a bonus when the tenant moves in the real-estate.

METHODS FOR CYCLIC NUCLEOTIDE DETERMINATION The present invention relates in general to cellular analysis tools and more particularly to methods for detecting or determining cyclic nucleotide concentrations in samples.

WELL DIVERTER ASSEMBLY WITH SUBSTANTIALLY PRESSURE BALANCED ANNULAR SEAL DEVICE. A diverter assembly can include a diverter having a deflection surface, and an annular seal device externally disposed and longitudinally displaceable on the assembly in response to a pressure differential being applied across the device. A well system can include a diverter assembly positioned in a casing, the assembly including a diverter and an annular seal device that seals off an annulus between the assembly and the casing, whereby a pressure differential across the device is reduced by movement of the device on the assembly. A method of sealing off an annulus formed between a diverter assembly and a casing can include positioning an annular seal device on a mandrel, the device being slidingly and sealingly engaged with an outer surface of the mandrel, connecting the mandrel to a diverter, and installing the assembly comprising the device, the mandrel and the diverter in the casing.

SINGLE DOUGH COOKIES HAVING STORAGE STABLE TEXTURE Incorporation of a carbohydrase into cookie dough provides, via a special baking process, a cookie having a storage stable texture which emulates that of freshly baked, home-style, drop-type cookies. The process for making these cookies involves 1) retarding enzyme activity in the finished dough before baking; 2) deactivating the enzyme in a portion of the cookie, preferably the surface; 3) activating the remainder of the enzyme; 4) allowing the remaining active enzyme to operate on the carbohydrates in the cookie; and 5) final baking.

PHYSICAL LAYER PROCESSING FOR WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS SYSTEM USING CODE DIVISION MULTIPLE ACCESS

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide another data processing method that is different from existing UTRAN processings.

SOLUTION: The address mapping of bits in a physical channel buffer 84 is decided from the address of bits in a first interleaver buffer 82. The addresses of the physical channel buffer 84 are decided, corresponding to the addresses of the bits after rate matching, bit scrambling, second interleaving and physical channel mapping in a rate-matching engine 88. The bits are directly read from the first interleaver buffer 82 and written to the physical channel buffer 84 by using the decided address of the physical channel buffer 84.
