DEVICE FOR MATCHING USERS OF SHARED REAL ESTATE The present invention provides an apparatus for matching users of shared real estate based on the degree of overlap of living patterns. The apparatus includes: at least one processor; and a memory for storing instructions instructing the at least one processor to perform at least one step. The at least one step includes the steps of: obtaining first user input data from a user terminal of a first user; selecting a plurality of candidate real estate suitable for the first user from among a plurality of pre-registered shared real estate based on the first user input data; determining a plurality of matching candidate users suitable for preferred real estate selected from among the candidate real estate; selecting at least one optimal matching user from among the matching candidate users based on the first user input data; and transmitting information indicating the optimal matching user to the user terminal of the first user. The step of selecting the at least one optimal matching user includes the steps of: comparing second user input data corresponding to the matching candidate users and the first user input data to determine the degree of similarity and the degree of overlap corresponding to each of the matching candidate users; and selecting a preset number of matching candidate users as the optimal matching user according to the degree of similarity and the degree of overlap. The present invention can maximize user satisfaction when using the shared real estate.

DEVICE FOR DRAWING PLASTIC MASS An apparatus for stretching plastic dough comprises a plurality of conveyors (1, 2) arranged in series and a plurality of rollers (3) disposed above the conveyors and cooperatively acting to stretch dough fed therebetween. The rollers are freely rotatable and their shafts (4) are fixed to connecting arms (5) which reciprocate them above the conveyors.

House rental negotiation method and system The invention discloses a house rental negotiation method and system, and the method comprises the steps: collecting house rental information reported by a lessee, and obtaining the house information,a living expense initial value and property service information; checking lessee identity and credit information, and coordinately signing a house lease contract; evaluating the home furnishing of the house for the first time, checking potential safety hazards, and generating and storing home furnishing initial state information of the house; determining a house deposit limit, and keeping the house deposit of the tenant; collecting house maintenance information, assisting a tenant to complete maintenance, and generating a house maintenance record; and when the tenant checks out the house, re-evaluating the house home, comparing the house home use state with the home initial state to obtain the home damage degree, calculating the compensation amount, and after the tenant pays the compensation, performing contract cancelling and returning the house deposit. The problems that in the prior art, tenants need to know a large amount of house renting information during house renting, and thehouse renting satisfaction degree is poor are solved. The technical effect is that the success rate of house renting and the satisfaction degree of tenants are significantly improved.

SOLID FAT MASS, METHOD FOR PRODUCING AND USING THE SAME FIELD: food-processing industry, in particular, production of various liquid fat dispersions. ^ SUBSTANCE: solid fat mass suitable for stabilizing of liquid dispersion of fat-free phase in triglyceride oil is comprised of triglyceride mixture including at least 5 wt% of at least two triglycerides having melting temperature > 550C; at least 15 wt% of triglycrides with fatty acid residue characterized by length of the longest and of the shortest chains for at least four carbon atoms; and <= 25 wt% of triglycerides with melting temperature of 25-550C. Method involves providing mixing or automatic transesterification or oil acidolysis under treatment conditions providing for production of solid fat mass. Liquid fat phase comprises dispersed phase immiscible with fat, with fat phase being solid fat phase. ^ EFFECT: increased efficiency in producing of flowing and stable fat dispersion. ^ 10 cl, 10 dwg, 7 tbl, 5 ex

Stabilizers and compositions and products comprising same Compositions containing microcrystalline cellulose, cellulose ether, and salt are provided together with methods for making them. Additionally, there are also described edible food products and industrial suspensions formed from these compositions.

Polarized sprectrally-precoded transmission A processing unit for a transmitter comprises a transformation unit configured to replace a subset of a set of input symbols with one or more fixed symbols to obtain a transformed set of symbols and aprecoder configured to apply the precoding matrix to the transformed set of symbols to obtain a precoded transformed set of symbols, wherein the subset is based on a distortion of the precoding matrix.

Methods and compositions for isothermal DNA amplification The invention relates to methods for amplifying a DNA template, comprising incubating the DNA template with a DNA-dependent RNA polymerase in the presence of ribonucleotides and amplifying the DNA template by a strand- displacing DNA polymerase. The invention further relates to the use of a RNA polymerase for generating a ribonucleotide primer on a DNA template, followed by amplification of the DNA template by a strand-displacing DNA polymerase, to a kit of parts, comprising a RNA polymerase and a strand-displacing DNA-dependent DNA polymerase, and to the use of the kit of parts for amplification of a DNA template.

A sweetener material composition prevented solidification and manufacturing method thereof PURPOSE: A solidification prevented sweetener material composition, and a producing method thereof are provided to control the excessive adsorption of sugar into the human body. CONSTITUTION: A producing method of a solidification prevented sweetener material composition comprises a step of mixing 95-99.9wt% of sweetening material and 0.1-5wt% of edible fibers to coat particles of the sweetening material with the edible fiber. The sweetening material is obtained by mixing sugar and xylose in a weight ratio of 1:0.05-0.5. The edible fibers are indigestible maltodextrin.

NEW SUBSTANCE DC113 AND PRODUCTION THEREOF NEW MATERIAL:A substance DC113, expressed by the formula and having the following physico-chemical properties. Molecular weight; 477. Molecular formula; C25H23N3O7. Mass spectrometry; SIMS 478(M+1)<+>. EIMS 477(M)<+>. Specific rotatory power; [alpha]=+180 deg. (C=0.1, methanol). Solubility; soluble in chloroform, DMSO, methanol, ethyl acetate and acetone and sparingly soluble in water and n-hexane. Color reaction; positive to Ehrlich reagent. Color and properties; light yellow basic substance, etc. USE:An antitumor and antimicrobial agents. PREPARATION:A microorganism, such as Streptomyces sp. DO-113 (FERM BP-2222), belonging to the genus Streptomyces is cultured in a culture medium at 25-32 deg.C and culture medium pH6-8 for 1-7 days preferably by a submerged spinnter culture method.

PURIFYING GROWTH HORMONE-LIKE MATERIALS A process is provided for separating impurities from an impure mixture containing growth hormone-like material, which comprises: (1) applying said mixture to a reverse phase macroporous acryulate ester copolymer resin support at a pH of from about 7 to about 9; and (2) eluting said growth hormone-like material from said support with an aqueous eluant having a pH of from about 7 to about 9 and containing from about 20% to about 80% by volume of an organic diluent selected from the group consisting of acetone, acetonitrile, and a combination of acetone and acetonitrile.

AEROSOL PROVISION SYSTEM An aerosol provision system comprising: a liquid storage area comprising a liquid formulation; an aerosol generating area; a membrane disposed between the liquid storage area and the aerosol generating area, said membrane fluidly communicating the liquid storage area with the aerosol generating area; wherein the liquid formulation has a water content of at least 18% w/w.

Improvements in reinforced concrete girders or beams 172,773. Bradshaw, F. W. Sept. 29, 1920. Reinforced-concrete girders and beams.-A reinforced-concrete girder, beam, or pit prop is made with the compression boom x straight and the tension boom y sloping upwards from the centre to the ends, and with vertical struts a and openings z. Both booms are doubly reinforced and the bars are welded together at the ends. Extra reinforcements i<1> may be added over the openings z. The bearing ends may be flat, or concave sheet-iron guards h, Fig. 11, may be clipped over the ends to coact with rounded heads of props. Smaller beams may be made without the openings z, as shown in Fig. 15. The girders and beams are applied to a mine gallery as shown in Figs. 14 and 15.

Multi-node system, internodal crossbar switch, node and medium embodying program A multi-node system for making the data transfer between nodes via each internodal crossbar switch comprises a plurality of internodal crossbar switches having a switch for transmitting the transfer data from a plurality of nodes to the node of transfer destination. If a fault occurs in the switch, the system is configured to make the data transfer between the nodes via any other internodal crossbar switch than the internodal crossbar switch having the switch where the fault occurs.

CUTTING ELEMENT FOR A DRILL BIT USED IN DRILLING SUBTERRANEAN FORMATIONS A cutting element for use in a drill bit for drilling subterranean formations includes a cutting body having a substrate including a rear surface, an upper surface, and a peripheral side surface extending between the rear surface and the upper surface, and a superabrasive layer overlying the upper surface of the substrate. The cutting element further includes a sleeve surrounding the peripheral side surface of the cutting body and comprising a superabrasive layer bonded to an external surface of the sleeve.

Remote control and signaling system Several remote control and signaling systems 10, 80 allow for the remote operational control of an apparatus 20, by a transmitter 14. These systems 10, 80 obviate the need for a line of sight relationship between transmitter 14 and control apparatus 20 and are further adapted to receive original control signal 15 and to thereafter generate a relatively high frequency signal 22, to facilitate this desired control. Moreover, a transmitter mounting assembly 90 is adapted to removably mount several dissimilar transmitters 98, 100, 102 and which allows for the remote control of a plurality of apparatuses 20 in an efficient manner.

POLARIZED SPRECTRALLY-PRECODED TRANSMISSION A processing unit for a transmitter comprises a transformation unit configured to replace a subset of a set of input symbols with one or more fixed symbols to obtain a transformed set of symbols and a precoder configured to apply the precoding matrix to the transformed set of symbols to obtain a precoded transformed set of symbols, wherein the subset is based on a distortion of the precoding matrix.

Bean peel removing machine The invention discloses a bean peel removing machine. The bean peel removing machine comprises a base, a processing cup, stirring blades, a separation net and a driving mechanism, the driving mechanism is installed on the base, the processing cup is installed on the base, and the separation net and the stirring blades are installed in the processing cup; the separation net is used for separating the processing cup into a separation space and a processing space; the stirring blades are pivoted in the processing space and are synchronously connected with the driving mechanism; and a guide part is arranged in the processing cup, and the guide part is used for guiding bean peels of beans to reach the separation space through the separation net when the stirring blades rotate. The bean peel removing machine can remove bean peels and can also guide bean peel residues to be separated from beans.

Phosphoryl muramyl peptides, method for their preparation and their use in medicines. Phosphorylmuramyl peptides of the formula <IMAGE> are immuno-potentiating. In the formula, R1 represents optionally substituted alkyl or aryl, R2, R4, R6 and R7 represent, for example, hydrogen, R3 represents hydrogen or lower alkyl, R5 represents, for example, hydrogen, lower alkyl, hydroxy-lower alkyl, amino-lower alkyl, cycloalkyl, cycloalkyl-lower alkyl, aryl or aralkyl, or nitrogen-containing heterocyclyl or heterocyclyl-lower alkyl, and one of the radicals A1 and A2 represents a radical of the formula (II) <IMAGE> (II) In the formula (II), T represents NH or O, Y represents an optionally substituted alkylene group, which may also be interrupted by one or two oxycarbonyl and/or iminocarbonyl groups, and W represents an aliphatic radical or a cycloalkyl or cycloalkenyl radical having more than 6 carbon atoms. The other of the radicals A1 and A2 represents free or etherified hydroxy, amino, lower alkylamino or aminocarbonyl-lower alkylamino.

System for risk mitigation based on road geometry and weather factors A method is disclosed for mitigating the risks associated with driving by assigning risk values to road segments and using those risk values to select less risky travel routes. Various approaches to helping users mitigate risk are presented. A computing device is configured to generate a database of risk values. That device may receive accident information, geographic information, vehicle information, and other information from one or more data sources and calculate a risk value for the associated road segment. Subsequently, the computing device may provide the associated risk value to other devices. Furthermore, a personal navigation device may receive travel route information and use that information to retrieve risk values for the road segments in the travel route. An insurance company may use this information to determine whether to adjust a quote or premium of an insurance policy. This and other aspects relating to using geographically encoded information to promote and reward risk mitigation are disclosed.
Restricted immunoglobulin heavy chain mice Mice having a restricted immunoglobulin heavy chain locus are provided, wherein the locus is characterized by a single polymorphic human V

Personal security manager for ubiquitous patient monitoring The present invention relates to a system and corresponding method for a secure end-to-end patient healthcare system which includes wireless medical sensors adapted to be attached to a patient's body and in communication with each other forming a body sensor network within a wireless medical sensor network including one or more body sensor networks; key establishing module with a safety factor lambda incorporated into each wireless medical sensor for enabling secure communications between the wireless medical sensors, and a personal security manager within the body sensor network and in communication with the wireless medical sensors within the body sensor network, the personal security manager providing secure communications with backend services and providing security relationships within the body sensor network by means of the key establishing module with a safety factor lambda, wherein the key establishing module with a safety factor lambda are such that a coalition of no more than lambda compromised wireless medical sensors conceals a pairwise key between any two non-compromised wireless medical sensors and provides protection against node compromise until lambda+1 wireless medical sensors have been compromised.

Communications effects in network simulations Real-time, high fidelity communication effects are simulated. A transmitter in a platform simulation is requested to send a surrogate message to a receiver in the platform simulation. Communications effects are computed in response to the message, and the communications effects are saved for later use. When a future communication event involving the transmitter and receiver occurs, the saved effects are used to simulate the communication effects for that event.

AEROSOL GENERATION DEVICE To provide an aerosol generation device having a structure that a user cannot arbitrarily disassemble.SOLUTION: An aerosol generation device includes: a case in which a heater 1030 for heating a cigarette 2000 is provided; a bracket for supporting a component provided inside the case; a fastening member for fastening the case and the bracket; and a cap provided on an exterior surface of the case for concealing the fastening member inside the case, which cannot be separated after the installation.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

Herbicide-resistant ahas-mutants and methods of use The invention provides transgenic or non-transgenic plants with improved levels of tolerance to AHAS-inhibiting herbicides. The invention also provides nucleic acids encoding mutants of the acetohydroxyacid synthase (AHAS) large subunit, expression vectors, plants comprising the nucleic acids encoding the AHASL subunits containing one, two, or more mutations, plants comprising such AHASL subunit mutant nucleic acids, methods for making and using the same, and methods of controlling weeds.

SEASONING SYSTEM AND METHOD An improved seasoning system (10, 11, 13) uniformly coats a food product wit h the desired amount of seasoning, with the seasoning rate preferably being controlled as a function of the product volume signals from the sensors (26, 34, 108 and 110). The seasoning system preferably utilizes linear motion conveyors and either a rotating drum (36) of a deflector (98) and a second seasoning unit (112, 114) between linear conveyors (94, 96). Oil may be sprayed onto food products and tumbled in a drum (16) which both rotates and moves in a reciprocating manner with the conveyor tray (14). An improved seasoning tray (123, 144, 148) has a planar floor (122, 138, 162) with an angled discharge edge (124, 137, 182) for uniformly distributing seasoning o n the product. The seasoning system minimizes damage to the food product and uniformly coats the product with a desired amount of seasoning.

PROCESS FOR PREPARING BUTTER FAT,OPTIONALLY BUTTER WITH REDUCED CONTENT OF CHOLESTEROL AND APPARATUS FOR MAKING THE SAME In a process for producing low-cholesterol butter fat or butter by steam treatment, the fat is treated with steam in one or more horizontal or slightly inclined reaction pipes at a temperature of 195 to 250 DEG C and a pressure of 0.5 to 5 mbar. The steam is injected through steam-outlet holes in the walls of mutually parallel steam pipes which extend through the layer that conducts the liquid fat (oil) along the whole length of the reaction pipe parallel to the axis of the pipe. The vapour is removed and the fat, to which fat recombination substances may be added, is cooled. The low-cholesterol butter fat of butter can be readily obtained in an installation which contains several reaction pipes, and can be advantageously used to manufacture foods and luxury foodstuffs, in particular for dietetic products, or consumed or processed directly as a dietary fat.

Novel enzyme thick pulp and preparation method thereof The invention discloses a novel enzyme thick pulp and a preparation method thereof, and relates to the field of health care products, the novel enzyme thick pulp comprises the following components by weight: 45-55% of purified water, 0.8-1.2% of earthworm protein, 7-11% of enzyme, 7-11% of agkistrodon halys, 8-10% of yolk powder, 5-8% of collagen, 2-3% of phospholipid, and the balance of auxiliary materials. According to the invention, the earthworm protein, the agkistrodon halys, the collagen and the enzyme are added, and then the preparation method is adopted, so that the novel enzyme thick pulp becomes thick pulp type beverage, and can be used for transforming cells, repairing necrotic cells and promoting metabolism; detoxification, detoxification, blood purification and physique improvement are realized; the novel enzyme thick pulp has the effects of enhancing immunity, improving self-healing capacity, decomposing cancerogenic substances and cancer bud cells, preventing hypertension, myocardial infarction, arrhythmia and stroke embolism, dredging collaterals, relieving pain and detoxifying, and plays an important role in the physiological functions of growth and metabolism of human cells, regulation of heart and brain organs and prevention of angiosclerosis.

Subsea wellhead assembly A subsea wellhead assembly is provided. The subsea wellhead assembly comprises: a conductor; a subsea wellhead; and subsea riser system equipment mounted on the subsea wellhead; wherein the subsea riser system equipment is connected to the conductor such that forces can be transmitted from the subsea riser equipment to the conductor.

Process for treating liquorice leaves after water removing The invention discloses a process for treating liquorice leaves after water removing. The process comprises the following steps of: liquorice leaves for water removing are placed in a grid barrel connected by sleeving in a water removing barrel with a gap remained between an outer wall of the grid barrel and an inner wall of the water removing barrel, and a water removing heat resource located on the inner wall of the water removing barrel is turned on; due to inclined arrangement of an inclined plate, a lower-position end of the inclined plate is hinged to a water removing underbed to which a telescopic support is further fixed, and the upper-position end of the inclined plate is hinged to a telescopic end of the telescopic support; a sleeving ring is fixed to the inclined plate; the water removing barrel is movably nested into the sleeving ring and is capable of rotating around an own axis thereof; the central axis of the water removing barrel is parallel to the surface of the inclined plate; a water removing driving shaft arranged concentrically with the water removing barrel is fixed to a bottom wall of the water removing barrel; the water removing driving shaft is driven by a power device to rotate to put the water removing barrel into rotation around the own axis thereof, thus causing rolling over of the liquorice leaves placed in the grid barrel until the end of water removing.

CONTROL LOGIC METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR OPTIMIZING PRODUCTION FROM NATURAL GAS WELLS In a system for optimizing natural gas production in response to real-time variations in wellbore parameters, a PLC or other wellsite intelligence technology is used to monitor liquid and gas production from the wellbore under friction-loaded conditions. Using baseline production data obtained during production tests, the PLC determines and initiates the appropriate operating mode for the wellbore to optimize a selected production criterion to suit measured wellbore parameters. The operating mode either a continuous clean-out mode, in which gas is continuously injected into the wellbore to control liquid loading, or an intermittent clean-out, in which liquid loading is regulated by intermittent gas injection. In preferred embodiments, the system uses bladder-type control valves having upstream and downstream solenoids, to control production tubing flow rate within a range between upper and lower set points.

Single input/output port radio frequency transceiver front end circuit A front end circuit for coupling an antenna to a radio frequency (RF) transceiver for time domain duplex systems is disclosed. The front end circuit includes an antenna port, a power amplifier, a low noise amplifier, and a matching network. The output of the power amplifier and the input of the low noise amplifier are coupled to the matching network and connected in common to the antenna. The power amplifier and the low noise amplifier are activated and deactivated in sequence corresponding to the transmit and receive modes of the transceiver, and the matching network minimizes the effect that one has on the other at the designated operating frequency.

MULTILAYERED BALL SEALER AND METHOD OF USE THEREOF A multilayered ball sealer having a deformable layer. The multilayered ball sealer has an outer or intermediate layer that is deformable under pressure. In the former, the deformable layer may be water-soluble or hydrolysable. In the latter, the outer layer is a sheath that contains the deformable layer and adapts to its shape. A multilayered ball sealer may be used as a diversion agent by being suspended in a fluid injected into a wellbore and applying pressure to deform the shape of the intermediate layer such that the multilayered ball sealer adapts to the shape of a perforation opening on which the multilayered ball sealer has seated.

Identity recognition method and system, machine readable medium and equipment The invention provides an identity recognition method. The identity recognition method comprises the following steps: detecting one or more property management objects in image information of a property management area; determining behavior parameters of the one or more property management objects; and identifying the identity of the one or more property management objects according to the behavior parameters of the one or more property management objects, thereby greatly improving the management and control of the property management personnel on the property management objects.

AEROSOL GENERATING DEVICE Provided is an aerosol generating device including a case in which a heater for heating a cigarette is installed, a bracket for supporting components installed inside the case, a fastening member for fastening the case and the bracket, and a cap that is installed on an outer surface of the case in an inseparable manner to conceal the fastening member in the case.

ISOMERISATION OF EQUILIN The invention relates to a method of isomerisation of equilin or a derivative thereof to delta(8,9)-dehydro estrone ¢delta(8,9)DHE!, characterized in that equilin or a derivative thereof is treated with a lithium salt of ethylenediamine or with lithium amide in dimethylsulfoxide.

SILICONE ROLLING PIN A Rolling pin including a core a silicone-containing jacket over the core defining a rolling surface. The jacket may be of such length and so positioned on ther core as to defined end regions of the jacket extending beyond the ends of the core; the jacket end regions being folded inward over the ends of the core; a cap securing to the core each folded inward end region of the jacket. A handle may be at each end of the core.

CHIMERIC HEAMAGLUTININ PROTEINS AND USES THEREOF The invention relates to chimeric proteins which comprise an amino acid sequence of a viral protein and which exhibit structural and functional properties of the native parent proteins, as well as nucleic acids and expression vectors encoding such proteins and host cells expressing such proteins. The invention further relates to expression of the chimeric proteins, including in recombinant viruses, as well as uses of the chimeric proteins and recombinant viruses expressing them.

Intelligent digital security system An intelligent digital security system comprises a terminal and a database server connected with the terminal. The terminal comprises a login module, a customer management module, a stationary point management module, a logistics management module, a supervisory management module, an employee management module, a fund management module, a duty management module and a background management module. The intelligent digital security system provides a big data interactive platform of the security industry, achieves real data integration and sharing by integrating the data, improves worker deployment and emergency treatment capabilities, customizes a functional module, improves an internal management process module, and strengthens the management system and flows of a company to achieve compact and standardized management and improve business capabilities.

Brake-sizing devices for food stuffing apparatus and methods of use A highly versatile, resilient and durable food casing sizing device for regulating the release of unfilled casing from a stuffing horn is specially useful in filling casings having string tied end-closures. The sizing ring releases looped strings and other suspending means which may become compressed against the exterior wall of the casing and filling horn without rupturing the casing when filling is initiated while also providing a high degree of product dimensional uniformity. Differential compression of the sizing device also permits stuffing curved "old world" style sausage products. The sizing device which is flexible can also be used for stuffing delicate thin walled casings, such as unreinforced thermoplastic types and collagen casings without damage.

SYSTEMS AND METHODS OF DATA TRANSMISSION AND MANAGEMENT Data communications systems and methods comprise a conductive media infrastructure in communication with a baseband data universe propagating at least one first signal and a broadband data universe propagating at least one second signal. At least one segmentation device is in communication with the conductive media infrastructure and partitions the broadband data universe from the baseband data universe. A coupling device is in communication with the at least one segmentation device and modulates transmission parameters of the second signal such that information travels within the broadband data universe via the conductive media infrastructure and avoids the baseband data universe. Power distribution and management systems and methods are also provided which preserve power distribution via a baseband data universe while one or more devices communicate energy data via a broadband data universe

COFFEE COMPOSITION AND METHOD FOR PRODUCING SAID COMPOSITION The invention relates to the food industry, in particular to the technology for producing instant coffee by freeze drying and can be used in coffee production factories. The final coffee composition on the basis of freeze-dried coffee, which contains finely ground natural roasted coffee within the freeze-dried granules, has the organoleptic properties of freshly prepared ground natural coffee and, unlike the latter, does not require brewing. In the described methods, finely ground natural roasted coffee of one type or a blend of different types, depending on the required organoleptic qualities of the final product, is introduced into a concentrated liquid coffee extract prior to freeze drying. The coffee composition and method according to the invention make it possible to expand the range of freeze-dried coffee by introducing water-insoluble food additives in one technological cycle.

House property subscription qualification verification method, server and storage medium The invention discloses a house property subscription qualification verification method which comprises the following steps: obtaining identity information of a house purchaser, and carrying out identity verification on the house purchaser according to the identity information; when the identity verification is passed, carrying out drawing on the house buyer to obtain drawing result information; adding the lottery drawing result information to house buyer information corresponding to the house buyer; and verifying whether the subscription qualification of the house purchaser is valid accordingto the identity information and the added house purchaser information. The invention also discloses a server and a computer readable storage medium. According to the invention, the real estate building sales efficiency is improved.

COFFEE EXTRACT PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide coffee extract of rich variety, which is enhanced in coffee characteristics.SOLUTION: A roasted product is provided, which is prepared through the following process: coffee beans are blended with at least one material selected from a group consisting of oolong tea, puerh tea, black tea, rose, jasmine, hop, hibiscus, lemongrass, Japanese pepper fruit, rosemary, vanilla, sugar beet, tangle, red bean, kidney bean, pea, soybean, almond, cashew nut, horse chestnut fruit, pumpkin seed, chestnut, walnut, sesame, sunflower seed, hazelnut, pecan nut, macadamia nut, pine fruit, peanut, rice, barley, malt, buckwheat fruit, Coix lacryma-joli, mandarin orange rind, orange rind, Citrus sphaerocarpa rind, grapefruit rind, Citrus sudachi rind, citron rind, lime rind, lemon rind, blueberry, prune, cherry fruit, persimmon, pineapple, banana, grape, mango, peach, apple, pepper, capsicum, sugarcane, ginger, garlic, onion, carrot, burdock, pumpkin, sweet potato, potato and corn, followed by conducting roasting of the resultant blend.
Specific eatable taste modifiers Ingestible compounds which are substantially tasteless and which have been found to be effective reducers or eliminators of undesirable tastes for eatables.
Bursopoietin A synthetic peptide which possesses the ability to specifically induce the differentiation of precursor B cells into mature B-cells capable of producing antibody.

Construction method for reinforcing and repairing damaged coal bunker at shaft bottom The invention discloses a construction method for reinforcing and repairing a damaged coal bunker at shaft bottom, and relates to the technical field of coal bunker reinforcing and repairing. According to the construction method for reinforcing and repairing the damaged coal bunker at the shaft bottom, coal stored in a coal bunker serves as an operation platform, the coal stored on the lower portion plays a role in filling and protecting walls, and climbing and suspension operation is avoided; and a coal bunker wall is supported through the combination of reinforced concrete and anchor cables, an overall coal bunker supporting structure is formed, the problem that a traditional coal bunker anchor-shotcrete supporting structure is low in strength is solved, the weak face of the coal bunker can be effectively prevented from being damaged by continuous friction and collision, and the service life is prolonged. Compared with the existing coal bunker reinforcing and repairing technology, the construction method for reinforcing and repairing the damaged coal bunker at the shaft bottom is less in equipment investment, small in construction space, low in cost, fast in progress, high in supporting strength, wide in application range and safe and reliable in technology.

Adaptive low latency receive queues A receive queue provided in a computer system holds work completion information and message data together. An InfiniBand hardware adapter sends a single CQE+message data to the computer system that includes the completion information and data. This information is sufficient for the computer system to receive and process the data message, thereby providing a highly scalable low latency receiving mechanism.

MULTIAMPLIFIER SYSTEM ON VEHICLE PURPOSE:To easily lead a wiring around. CONSTITUTION:The audio signal from a source 1 is superposed on the power for driving main amplifiers 3, 4, and 5 and is sent by a power and signal superposing circuit 13 provided on the side of the source 1, and an audio signal extracting circuit 14 extracts the audio signal, A frequency dividing circuit 2 divides this extracted audio signal into prescribed bands and supplies them to main amplifiers 3, 4, and 5 to reproduce the audio signal. Consequently, the number of signal lines 12 is reduced because the audio signal superposed on the power from the power and signal superposing circuit 13 can be sent to the audio signal extracting circuit 14 and the frequency dividing circuit 2 by one signal line 12, and thus, the wiring is easily led around in a complicated wiring position.

Power amplifier system A power amplifier system having a power amplifier with a signal input and a signal output, bias circuitry coupled to the signal input, and a radio frequency (RF) peak detector having an input coupled to the signal output is disclosed. The RF peak detector is configured to generate a peak voltage signal. Temperature-compensated overvoltage protection circuitry coupled between an output of the RF peak detector and a control input of the bias circuitry is configured to respond to the peak voltage signal crossing over a predetermined peak voltage threshold and to provide an overvoltage protection control signal to cause the bias circuitry to adjust biasing for the power amplifier to reduce an overvoltage condition at the RF peak detector input.

Process for isolating ª-antitrypsin from human or animal body fluids a 1-antitrypsin is isolated from an a 1-antitrypsin-containing fraction obtained by ammonium sulphate precipitation from serum or ascitic liquid as described in Z. Naturforschung 10b, 463, 1955 by the following process (a) a compound of the acridine or quinoline series is added to the said fraction at a pH of 5.5 to 6.5 in a practically salt-free medium and at a concentration of said fraction in the range 1 to 6 per cent, (b) the addition is continued until the proteins which accompany a 1-antitrypsin are precipitated, (c) the precipitate is rejected, (d) the a 1-antitrypsin is precipitated from the liquid portion by increasing the pH value up to 6.5-7.5 and also the concentration of the said compound of the acridine or quinoline series, (e) the precipitate obtained is isolated and dissolved in water, (f) the acridine or quinoline base is precipitated from the solution prepared in (e) at a pH 4.0 to 5.5 by means of an inorganic salt, (g) the pH value of the a 1-antitrypsin solution is adjusted to pH 5.0 to 6.0, (h) the a 1-antitrypsin is precipitated at -1 DEG C. to -5 DEG C. by the addition of a water-miscible aliphatic alcohol up to a content in the medium of 40-50 per cent, (i) the precipitated a 1-antitrypsin is separated and dissolved in water and the organic precipitant adhering to the precipitate is removed by dialysis and the a 1-antitrypsin solution so formed is concentrated and/or lyophilized. The compound of step (a) may be 2-ethoxy-6, 9-diamino acridine lactate, bis-(2-methyl-4-amino-quinolyl-6)-carbamide hydrochloride, 3, 6-diamino-10-methyl acridinium chloride, 5-aminoacridine, a ,g -trimethylene glycol di-(2-methyl-4-aminoquinolyl)-6 ether diacetate or di-n-butylmalonic acid amide-N-N-di-(2-methyl-4-aminoquinolyl-6)-diacetate. a 1-antitrypsin is a therapeutic glycoprotein which occurs in the blood and is an inhibitor for proteolytic ferments.

Device and method for high-throughput quantification of mRNA from whole blood Disclosed are a method, device kit, and automated system for simple, reproducible, and high-throughput quantification of mRNA from whole blood. More particularly, the method, device, kit and automated system involve combinations of leukocyte filters attached to oligo(dT)-immobilized multi-well plates.

Novel phosphorylmuramyl peptides and processes for the manufacture thereof Phosphorylmuramyl peptides of the formula <IMAGE> are immuno-potentiating. LOW-TEMPERATURE BAKING SMOKING SET A low-temperature baking smoking set, comprising: a heating substrate (31), which is in a hollow shape and comprises a heating bin used for containing a smoking substance therein; an infrared coating (32), coated on the outer side of the heating substrate (31); a first conductive module (331, 341, 351, 361, 371), provided outside the heating substrate (31) and in contact with the infrared coating (32); a second conductive module (332, 342, 352, 362, 372), provided outside the heating substrate (31) and in contact with the infrared coating (32), at least a part of the infrared coating (32) being positioned between the first conductive module (331, 341, 351, 361, 371) and the second conductive module (332, 342, 352, 362, 372); and a power supply unit (5), electrically connected to the first conductive module (331, 341, 351, 361, 371) and the second conductive module (332, 342, 352, 362, 372), so that infrared light generated by at least a part of the far infrared coating (32) after power up passes through the heating substrate (31) to carry out radiation heating on the smoking substance in the heating bin. Due to the strong penetrability of the infrared light, the infrared light can penetrate the peripheral smoking substance and enter the interior, so that the smoking substance is uniformly heated.

Specific eatable taste modifiers Ingestible compounds which are substantially tasteless and which have been found to be effective reducers or eliminators of undesirable tastes for eatables.

Aloe cold noodles and making method thereof The invention discloses aloe cold noodles. The cold noodles comprise 50-70 parts of wheat flour, 30-50 parts of edible corn starch, 50-60 parts of drinking water, 30-40 parts of red date powder, 20-30 parts of eggs, 10-20 parts of edible oil, 10-20 parts of edible salt, 100-200 parts of spinach, 20-30 parts of scallion powder, 100-200 parts of aloe barbadensis, 50-60 parts of celery, 50-60 parts of carrots, 20-30 parts of lemon juice, 20-30 parts of honey and 1-10 parts of a food additive. A making method of the aloe cold noodles is further provided, which is characterized in that the method comprises the following steps of: step one, selecting and cleaning the fresh spinach, aloe barbadensis, celery and carrots; step two, respectively crushing the spinach, the aloe barbadensis, the celery and the carrots by using a stirrer, then filtering out spinach juice, the aloe barbadensis, the celery and carrot juice, and then sterilizing the spinach juice, the aloe barbadensis juice, the celery juice and the carrot juice; step three, cracking the eggs into a basin, and then performing uniform stirring; and step four, mixing a proper amount of the wheat flour, the edible corn starch, the red date powder, the edible salt, the scallion powder and the food additive.

Wireless transmission device and self-checking method thereof The embodiment of the invention discloses a wireless transmission device and a self-checking method thereof. The wireless transmission device comprises a service processing unit, a duplexer, a radio frequency receiving unit, a frequency synthesizer and a controller, wherein the controller starts a self-checking function, reduces a TR (Time-Frequency) interval to be within a preset range and controls the frequency synthesizer to regulate the frequency of local oscillator signals output to radio frequency receiving unit by the frequency synthesizer according to the reduced TR interval; the service processing unit continuously send service signals as self-checking signals, and after the self-checking signals are modulated to radio frequency signals, a part of the self-checking signals can be leaked to the radio frequency receiving unit through the duplexer; after the radio frequency receiving unit mixes the received signals with the local oscillator signals, the frequency of the self-checking signals included in output signals is in a passband range of an intermediate frequency receiving unit so as to ensure the self-checking signals are looped back to the service processing unit, therefore whether an own transmission channel is faulty or not is determined.

NEUTRAL PROTEASE, PRODUCT FOR TISSUE MACERATION USING THE NEUTRAL PROTEASE AND METHOD FOR PRODUCING THE SAME

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To obtain a product for tissue maceration brought to present an improved isolation result in relation to yield, survivability and integrity of cells, and provide a production method and application method of the same.

SOLUTION: Neutral protease (NP) is used together with collagenase to improve the isolation result in relation to the yield, the survivability and the integrity of the cells. The neutral protease which is not included in a collagenase enzyme preparation and is not produced by recombination production is mixed with the collagenase or the collagenase enzyme preparation by individually adjusting the mixing ratio of amount of the neutral protease and the collagenase ahead of tissue maceration.

Wellbore formation evaluation system and method with cooling A formation evaluation tool positionable in a wellbore penetrating a subterranean formation is provided. The formation evaluation tool includes a cooling system adapted to pass a cooling fluid near electronics in the formation evaluation tool whereby heat is dissipated therefrom, the electronics has at least one gauge, a fluid communication device having an inlet adapted to receive the formation fluid and a flowline operatively connected to the fluid communication device and the gauge for placing the formation fluid in fluid communication therewith whereby properties of the formation fluid are determined. The formation evaluation tool may also be provided with a plurality of sample chambers operatively connected to the flowline for collecting at least a portion of the formation fluid and a pressure compensator in fluid communication with the wellbore and operatively connected to the plurality of sample chambers for applying pressure to the sample chambers whereby pressure is balanced therebetween.

REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT AMOUNT AND INVESTMENT INDEX ESTIMATION METHOD AND SYSTEM USING THEREOF A method and a system for calculating a real estate investment cost and index are provided to calculate a real estate purchase/possession cost, calculate a BEP(Break-Even Point) based on a transfer margin, and offer the investment index to compare an investment value of several real estates. An investment amount calculation server(10) receives a signal for requesting a real estate investment cost calculation service from a user terminal(30), authenticates the received service request signal, bills a service charge to the user terminal, and calculates the real estate investment cost/index by using an embedded real estate investment cost calculating module(12). The user terminal receives a result by fixing the desired real estate and inputting data for the fixed real estate to the server. The server includes a real estate information database(11) and a BEP calculating module(13). The BEP calculating module calculates the BEP by calculating/adding the real estate purchase/possession cost and a transfer income tax.

Systems, methods, and apparatuses for accepting late joiners with screen sharing In accordance with disclosed embodiments, there are provided methods, systems, and apparatuses for accepting late joiners with screen sharing including, for example, means for receiving, at a server, a key frame from a publishing client sharing its screen, the key frame defining the screen of the publishing client in its entirety at the beginning of a screen sharing session with one or more viewing clients; transmitting the key frame to the one or more viewing clients; iteratively processing each of a plurality of delta frames from the publishing client specifying changes to the screen of the publishing client, wherein the iterative processing includes: (i) receiving each delta frame, (ii) updating an aggregated current key frame with the delta frame received, and (iii) sending the delta frame to the one or more viewing clients. Such means further include: accepting a late joiner viewing client for the screen sharing session; sending the aggregated current key frame to the late joiner viewing client; and sending subsequently received delta frames to the one or more viewing clients and to the late joiner viewing client. Other related embodiments are disclosed.
Bursopoietin. A synthetic peptide which possesses the ability to specifically induce the differentiation of precursor B cells into mature B-cells capable of producing antibody.

Restricted immunoglobulin heavy chain mice Mice having a restricted immunoglobulin heavy chain locus are provided, wherein the locus is characterized by a single polymorphic human VH gene segment, a plurality of human DH gene segments and a plurality of JH gene segments. Methods for making antibody sequences that bind an antigen (e.g., a viral antigen) are provided, comprising immunizing a mouse with an antigen of interest, wherein the mouse comprises a single human VH gene segment, a plurality of human DH gene segments and a plurality of JH gene segments, at the endogenous immunoglobulin heavy chain locus.

Seasoning system and method An improved seasoning system (10, 11, 13) uniformly coats a food product with the desired amount of seasoning, with the seasoning rate preferably being controlled as a function of the product volume signals from the sensors (26, 34, 108 and 110). The seasoning system preferably utilizes linear motion conveyors and either a rotating drum (36) of a deflector (98) and a second seasoning unit (112, 114) between linear conveyors (94, 96). Oil may be sprayed onto food products and tumbled in a drum (16) which both rotates and moves in a reciprocating manner with the conveyor tray (14). An improved seasoning tray (123, 144, 148) has a planar floor (122, 138, 162) with an angled discharge edge (124, 137, 182) for uniformly distributing seasoning on the product. The seasoning system minimizes damage to the food product and uniformly coats the product with a desired amount of seasoning.

Aerosol provision system An aerosol provision system, such as an electronic cigarette, comprising a liquid storage area comprising a liquid formulation, an aerosol generating area and a membrane disposed between the two areas and fluidly communicating them, wherein the formulation has a water content of at least 18% w/w. The liquid formulation may also comprise glycerol, propylene glycol and nicotine. The device may additionally include a liquid distribution component disposed between the membrane and liquid storage area to guide the supply of liquid. The system may also comprise a detachable body section comprising a rechargeable power source, control unit and notification means.

Multilayered ball sealer and method of use thereof A multilayered ball sealer having a deformable layer. The multilayered ball sealer has an outer or intermediate layer that is deformable under pressure. In the former, the deformable layer may be water-soluble or hydrolysable. In the latter, the outer layer is a sheath that contains the deformable layer and adapts to its shape. A multilayered ball sealer may be used as a diversion agent by being suspended in a fluid injected into a wellbore and applying pressure to deform the shape of the intermediate layer such that the multilayered ball sealer adapts to the shape of a perforation opening on which the multilayered ball sealer has seated.

LIVE WELL STAGED INSTALLATION OF WET CONNECTED ESP AND RELATED METHOD An ESP assembly is broken into subassemblies to fit through a lubricator for live well deployment. A lifting device has a shaft transmission feature and associated housing rotational lock for use at the top of the first subassembly and to be left in position for engagement of the next assembly. The subassemblies can be delivered on wireline or slickline. A wet connect can be at the lower end of the initial subassembly to connect to a cable run alongside the production tubing. The ESP subassemblies all are interconnected in the live well and function as they would if assembled at the surface. The ability to break down the assembly and run it in segments lets the components fit through a length limited lubricator for live well deployment.
Kit and method for cGMP determination The present invention relates in general to cellular analysis tools and more particularly to methods of determining cyclic nucleotide concentrations in samples.

NOVEL PICHIA KUDRIAVZEVII STRAIN NG7 AND USE OF SAME The present invention relates to: a novel Pichia kudriavzevii strain NG7 showing heat resistance and acid resistance; a composition, for producing organic acid or alcohol, which comprises the strain and a cultured product of same; and a method, for producing organic acid or alcohol, which comprises a step for culturing the strain.

Preparation process of plum-leaf crab distilled liquor The invention discloses a preparation process of plum-leaf crab distilled liquor. The preparation process comprises the following steps of S1, selecting materials, specifically selecting mature plum-leaf crab which is free of mildew and rot, full in fruits and bright in color and luster and has fruit powder; S2, cleaning treatment, specifically, washing away dust on the surfaces of the plum-leaf crab through clear water, removing impurities, and meanwhile removing fruit stems; S3, steaming the materials, namely, putting the treated plum-leaf crab into a steamer, and steaming for 1.5 hours until the plum-leaf crab are thoroughly steamed; S4, crushing, namely, putting the steamed plum-leaf crab into a crusher for crushing, separating the seeds by utilizing the crusher, and putting the plum-leaf crab pulp of which the seeds are separated and removed into a prepared clean container for later use. According to the method, the plum-leaf crab are used as the main raw material to prepare the distilled liquor, and the distilled liquor is subjected to low-temperature fermentation to maintain rich fruity flavor and savoury and mellow taste, so that the distilled liquor has unique fruity flavor after being unsealed, the flavor of the distilled liquor is more unique, and meanwhile, the distilled liquor has certain nutritional value.

NUCLEIC ACID PREPARATION COMPOSITIONS AND METHODS Provided herein are methods and compositions to extract and enrich by, physical separation or amplification, relatively short nucleic acids from a nucleic acid composition containing a high background of longer nucleic acids (e.g., host or maternal nucleic acids; genomic nucleic acid and the like).

Service apparatus of checking room occupation having door free function The present invention discloses a service apparatus of checking the room occupation of a household member. The service apparatus of checking the room occupation includes a beacon part, a communication part, and a service controller. A beacon device generates a beacon signal of a set frequency. The communication part communicates with the wall pad of a housing unit, receives a disaster signal when a disaster occurs in the housing unit, and communicates with at least one registered wireless terminal of the housing unit. The service controller generates an occupation check request signal when the housing unit disaster signal is received, transmits the occupation check request signal to the at least one wireless terminal through the communication part, and then generates an occupation check signal and transmits it to the communication part when an occupation identification signal from the at least one wireless terminal is received through the communication part. It is possible to facilitate rescue in the event of the disaster.

WHEAT FLOUR GOODS INCLUDING ESTERN PRICKLY PEAR AND PRODUCTING METHOD FOR THE GOODS PURPOSE: A method for manufacturing a flour product containing Opuntia humifusa is provided to include nutrients such as dietary fiber, flavonoid, and calcium and to reduce wheat flour allergy. CONSTITUTION: A method for manufacturing a flour product comprises: a step of pulverizing dried Opuntia humifusa in a fine powder(110); a step of mixing 5-10g of the Opuntia humifusa powder, 30-80g of starch, and 300-330g of 3% saline solution, and maturing for 1-2 hours to prepare a dough(120); and a step of mixing the dough with 920-970g of wheat flour for 10-15 minutes, and maturing for 20-45 minutes(130). The method further comprises a step of forming the dough of Opuntia humifusa, starch and flour and preparing a dough sheet; a step of injecting the dough of Opuntia humifusa, starch and flour into an extruder and molding. Noodle is dried at 25 deg. C for 24-30 hours. Sujebi(Korean traditional soup containing dough flakes) is dried in a hot wind dry room at 50-60 deg. C for 30-60 minutes. [Reference numerals] (110) Processing Opuntia humifusa; (120) Mixing and kneading the Opuntia humifusa and starch; (130) Mixing and kneading the Opuntia humifusa, starch, and flour; (141) Dough sheet; (142) Extrusion molded product; (151) Noodle; (152) Sujebi(Korean traditional soup containing dough flakes);

Cell culture platform with self-sterilization function The invention relates to a cell culture platform with a self-sterilization function. The cell culture platform comprises a top plate, a base, a first baffle plate and a second baffle plate, and further comprises a shielding mechanism and a sterilization mechanism, wherein the sterilization mechanism comprises a retractable assembly, an ultraviolet sterilization lamp, a supporting shaft and an adjusting assembly; the retractable assembly comprises a driving unit, a telescopic frame, a retractable plate, a hinging block and a sliding block; the shielding mechanism comprises a rotary assembly anda movable assembly; the movable assembly comprises a rotary shaft, a driving gear, a sleeve, a connecting shaft and a rack. According to the cell culture platform with the self-sterilization function, provided by the invention, sterilization work can be carried out on the cell culture platform through the sterilization mechanism, and the shielding mechanism can be used for shielding radiation ofthe ultraviolet sterilization lamp while sterilization is carried out, so that a condition that the ultraviolet sterilization lamp irradiates a human body to cause threats to body health of a user isavoided, and the safety of the self-sterilization function is improved.

METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR DETECTING FIBER FAULT IN PASSIVE OPTICAL NETWORK The present invention provides a method and a system for detecting fiber fault in Passive Optical Network (PON). The system includes an optical path detection device, a Wavelength Division Multiplexing (WDM) coupler, a wavelength selection coupler, a branch fiber selector and a wavelength selection router. The detection system is attached to an original PON system, thus avoiding influence to the operation of the original system while running the detection. With the present invention, the problem of being unable to determine whether there is a fault in a branch fiber due to the loss of an optical path detection reflection signal is solved, the branch fiber with fault can be quickly located and fixed, thus reducing the operational and maintenance costs of an operator.
