Plant sprout-based emulsions, process for preparing them and use thereof The present invention relates to plant sprout-based stable oil-in-water emulsions wherein the monoacyl- and diacylglycerol content is at least 20 % by weight, the free fatty acid content is not more than 10 % by weight and comprise an aqueous homogenate of sprouted oily seeds of which the own enzymes and emulsifying substances are capable to form the emulsion. Furthermore, the invention also relates to the preparation of said emulsions as well as to various applications thereof.

Subsea wellhead assembly The subsea wellhead assembly 1 comprises: a conductor 2; a subsea wellhead 4; and subsea riser system equipment 6 mounted on the subsea wellhead; wherein the subsea riser system equipment is connected to the conductor such that forces can be transmitted from the subsea riser equipment to the conductor. The subsea riser equipment 6 may be a blowout preventer (BOP) or a subsea tree. The assembly may also comprise a connection device that connects the subsea riser system equipment to the conductor, such as a connection bracket or guide base 8. Connection members such as tensioners 14 may connect between the guide base 8 and the subsea riser equipment 8 so that forces are transmitted between them. Each tensioner may be used to preload the connection. A method of installing a subsea well assembly is also disclosed.

Systems and methods for the preparation of ethanol-containing beverages The present inventive concept relates generally to simulating the barrel aging or finishing process of distilled spirits in a rapid manner.
SUBSTANCE DC 113 AND PRODUCTION THEREOF A novel fermentation product, DC 113, represented by the formula which has antimicrobial and antitumor activities.

Noodle made of Canada potato and shrimp and manufacturing method of the same The present invention relates to a noodle dish using Jerusalem artichokes and shrimp and a preparing method thereof. The noodle dish is prepared and completed by cutting peeled shrimp and Jerusalem artichokes, aging the ingredients in saltwater, drying the ingredients, and preparing the dried ingredients in a powder form, grinding the washed Jerusalem artichokes in a grinder, filtering the ground substance through a fabric to separate the ground liquid therefrom, kneading wheat flour, powder, and ground liquid, aging the dough, and preparing noodles with a medium thickness, preparing garnish parts using onion peels, broth with fermented fish sauce and soy sauce, zucchini, carrots, Jerusalem artichokes, shrimp flesh, and squid flesh parts before boiling the noodles in the broth and adding the garnish parts thereon. The ratio of the shrimp and Jerusalem artichokes powder is appropriately adjusted in a blending operation to prepare the dough including the mixture of the ingredients and wheat flour for preparing noodles. Calcium and mineral supplements are naturally consumed by consuming the noodle dish while realizing and improving the soft and chewy texture of the noodles.

Negotiated wireless peripheral systems Methods, apparatus, and business techniques are disclosed for use in mobile network communication systems. A mobile unit such as a smart phone is preferably equipped with a wireless local area network connection and a wireless wide area network connection. The local area network connection is used to establish a position-dependent ecommerce network connection with a wireless peripheral supplied by a vendor. A negotiation sequence is carried out to electronically contract the services of the negotiated wireless peripheral from the vendor. The mobile unit is then temporarily augmented with the added peripheral services supplied by the negotiated wireless peripheral. In one example, a smart phone with Internet capability is temporarily augmented with a full sized display monitor, a keyboard and a mouse so that a business user in an airport can work on desktop applications. In other examples, the negotiated wireless peripheral is a general product or service vending device and the mobile unit acts as a digital authentication and payment device with digital cash and/or credit payment capabilities.

Pressure control in drilling operations with choke position determined by Cv curve A method of controlling pressure in a wellbore can include determining a desired position for a choke, the determining being based on a Cv curve for the choke, and adjusting the choke to the desired position, thereby producing a desired backpressure. A wellbore drilling system can include a choke which variably restricts flow of fluid from the wellbore, and a control system which compares actual and desired wellbore pressures and, in response to a difference between the actual and desired wellbore pressures, adjusts the choke to a predetermined position which corresponds to a desired Cv of the choke. A method of controlling pressure in a wellbore can include comparing an actual wellbore pressure to a desired wellbore pressure and, in response to a difference between the actual and desired wellbore pressures, adjusting a choke to a predetermined position, the predetermined position corresponding to a desired Cv of the choke.

System and method for communicating media signals A media streaming system for streaming media signals is provided. The media streaming system takes a library of separate and distinct CODECs (145) that are provided as a searchable CODEC library and used in determining specific characteristics in the media signal to identify similar sections of the signal. The media streaming system uses a computer implemented intelligence system, such as an intelligence mechanism to learn and capture the unique charateristics of a signal as the signal is being streamed (150). The media streaming system also compresses and decompresses the media signal as the signals are streamed from a source media (100) to a destination device (130, 135, 140).

System and method of computing price of real propety using similar price zone and actual transaction price The present invention relates to a system and method of computing the price of real property using similar price zone and actual transaction price. More specifically, the present invention relates to a system and method of computing the price of real property using similar price zone and actual transaction price to set similar price that classifies each real estate based on announced price, extract sample real estate belonging to the same class as a target real estate among a plurality of real estate properties belonging to the similar price zone. According to the present invention, it is possible to predict a real estate price close to a market price by classifying the similar price zone according to the location and the price level of the real estate and using the actual transaction price for each price zone. The system includes a database; a similar price ticket real estate extraction part; a real transaction price computing part; an evaluation reference price computing part; and a price determination part.

Restricted immunoglobulin heavy chain mice Mice having a restricted immunoglobulin heavy chain locus are provided, wherein the locus is characterized by a single polymorphic human VH gene segment, a plurality of human DH gene segments and a plurality of JH gene segments. Methods for making antibody sequences that bind an antigen (e.g., a viral antigen) are provided, comprising immunizing a mouse with an antigen of interest, wherein the mouse comprises a single human VH gene segment, a plurality of human DH gene segments and a plurality of JH gene segments, at the endogenous immunoglobulin heavy chain locus.

MINING SHIELD SUPPORT APPARATUS 1468987 Advancing mine roof supports BANYASZATI KUTATO INTEZET and VARPALOTAI SZENBANYAK 6 Dec 1974 [7 Dec 1973] 52853/74 Heading E1P In an advancing mine roof support assembly the roof cap 5 is provided with a cantilever extension 12 which is reciprocated by a ram 19 and urged into wedging engagement with the roof by track-engaging means such as projecting pins 13, 16 engaging guide tracks such as 17, 18 in the roof cap 5. Each guide track comprises two sections, one of which is disposed at an acute angle with the plane of the upper plate of the roof cap whilst the other is parallel with said plate.

Methods for enhancing animal digest palatability The invention provides methods for enhancing the palatability of animal digests by adding anti-gelling agents to animal digests while adjusting the pH to a pH optimal for proteases used to hydrolyze viscera proteins. The anti-gelling agents maximize the production of viscera protein hydrolysates that can participate in Maillard reactions and increase palatability of the animal digest.

Methods for increasing the production of ethanol from microbial fermentation A stable continuous method for producing ethanol from the anaerobic bacterial fermentation of a gaseous substrate containing at least one reducing gas involves culturing in a fermentation bioreactor anaerobic, acetogenic bacteria in a liquid nutrient medium; supplying the gaseous substrate to the bioreactor; and manipulating the bacteria in the bioreactor by reducing the redox potential, or increasing the NAD(P)H TO NAD(P) ratio, in the fermentation broth after the bacteria achieves a steady state and stable cell concentration in the bioreactor. The free acetic acid concentration in the bioreactor is maintained at less than 5 g/L free acid. This method allows ethanol to be produced in the fermentation broth in the bioreactor at a productivity of greater than 10 g/L per day. Both ethanol and acetate are produced in a ratio of ethanol to acetate ranging from 1:1 to 20:1.
SYNTHETIC ANTIBODIES AGAINST VEGF AND THEIR USES The invention provides novel synthetic antibodies directed against VEGF and uses thereof.

Downlink transmission method and device The embodiment of the invention provides a downlink transmission method and device and a system which are used for improving a coverage problem of different types of information. The downlink transmission method comprises the steps of determining a wireless frame, wherein the wireless frame comprises at least two of a first subframe, a second subframe and a third subframe, the first subframe comprises a first symbol, the second subframe comprises a second symbol, the third subframe comprises a first symbol and a second symbol, wherein the bandwidth of the first symbol is first bandwidth, the bandwidth of the second symbol is second bandwidth, and the first bandwidth is less than the second bandwidth; and performing downlink transmission based on the wireless frame. According to the invention, the wireless frame comprises the narrow-bandwidth first symbol and the broad-bandwidth second symbol simultaneously, so that the scheme provided by the embodiment of the invention can transmit different types of information through the first symbol and the second symbol so as to reduce the difference between coverage areas of the different types of information.

A drawworks for well drilling 842,435. Boring earth; cutting pressure control. CALIFORNIA RESEARCH CORPORATION Oct. 14, 1958 [Oct. 24, 1957], No. 32810/58. Class 85. [Also in Group XXIV] A rotary well drilling draw-works tor use in an off-shore drilling rig has means to maintain constant pressure of the drill bit on the well bottom regardless of movement of the drilling, barge with the surface of the water. The apparatus comprises a power unit 10 driving through a clutch 12 a sprocket assembly 18 which is free to rotate on the shaft 20 of a variable ratio gear box 22 which also includes a fluid coupling which can be set to provide a given torque output for a constant engine speed. The sprocket assembly 18 can be coupled to the shaft by a clutch 24. The shaft 26 drives a sprocket 30, which can be coupled to the sand line drum 32 by a clutch 34, and also drives a sprocket 38 which can be coupled to the casing line drum 60 by a clutch 84. The sprocket assembly 18 also drives a catshaft 54. The casing line drum is free to rotate on the shaft 66 and carries a second shaft 40 coaxial with the first. Free to rotate on the shaft 40 is the sprocket wheel 38 which carries a clutch member 76 with splines 78 which drive friction discs 80 and 82. The hub 86 of the clutch is keyed to the shaft 40 and has splines 90 which drive plates 92 and 94. The portion 96 of the clutch has a chamber 98 one wall of which is formed by a diaphragm 100. Pressurized air can be admitted to the chamber through duct 101 to flex the diaphragm and force the friction components 80, 82, 92 and 94 against the flange 88. At the opposite end of the casing line drum is a main brake assembly 104, secured to the shaft 66, which can be coupled to the drum by a clutch of similar construction to that already described and operated by air admitted through the duct 131. A brake band 140 is applied to the brake drum by a manually operated lever which also actuates the clutch air valve so that the clutch is engaged as the lever is displaced. Similarly the clutch is disengaged as the brake is released. An over-riding control permits the clutch to be permanently engaged regardless of the position of the brake lever. If the air supply should fail an emergency brake band 158 is applied by a spring to a brake drum 156 which is secured to the casing line drum. The emergency brake can also be operated manually. In operation the drive is set to rotate the casing line drum in a direction to wind in the casing line at a tension determined by the setting of the fluid coupling and hence support the bit with a predetermined weight on the bottom. If the drilling barge lifts with the water, the fluid coupling is over-loaded and the line is paid off the drum at the pre-selected tension, whereas if the barge drops the drum is driven to wind in the line until the tension is correct.

KNOTTED MESH AS SUPPORTING MATERIAL IN MINES A method for lining a support material in mining and tunnel constructions comprises the steps of: providing a plurality of lay wires in the long direction; providing a plurality of stay wires in the cross direction, the stay wires making intersections with said lay wires; providing knot wires to attach the lay wires to the stay wires in at least some of the intersections so as to form the support material; installing the support material against a ceiling or a wall of a mining or tunnel construction by means of bolts.

DOWNLINK TRANSMISSION METHOD AND APPARATUS Embodiments of the present invention provide a downlink transmission method, apparatus and system, for use in alleviating the problem of the coverage for different types of information. The method comprises: determining a radio frame, the radio frame comprising at least two among a first subframe, a second subframe and a third subframe, the first subframe comprising a first symbol, the second subframe comprising a second symbol, the third subframe comprising the first symbol and the second symbol, a bandwidth of the first symbol being a first bandwidth, a bandwidth of the second symbol being a second bandwidth, and the first bandwidth being smaller than the second bandwidth; and performing downlink transmission according to the radio frame. As known from the above description, the radio frame comprising both the first symbol having a smaller bandwidth and the second symbol having a greater bandwidth; accordingly, in the solution of the embodiments of the present invention, different types of information can be transmitted by means the first symbol and the second symbol, so as to reduce the difference among coverage ranges of different types of information.

Using method for sealer of well mouth of oil field The invention relates to a using method for a sealer of a well mouth of an oil field. The technical scheme comprises a connecting coupling, an eccentric pressing plate, a packing cavity body, a packing cavity, a sealing packing, a screwing-in inversed tooth, a rotary guiding body and an upper portion compression bolt. The connecting coupling and the eccentric pressing plate are connected through a bolt, the packing cavity body is pressed on the upper portion of the connecting coupling by the eccentric pressing plate, and the packing cavity is formed in the packing cavity body. The packing cavity is connected with the rotary guiding body through a groove in the upper portion of the packing cavity to enable the rotary guiding body to freely rotate. The upper portion compression bolt is connected with the rotary guiding body through a thread. The screwing-in inversed tooth is connected with the rotary guiding body through a protrusion and can move up and down. A polish rod is arranged in the packing cavity and freely moves up and down, and the sealing packing is wound on the polish rod through the screwing-in inversed tooth. The using method for the sealer of the well mouth of the oil field has the beneficial effects that when the sealing packing is replaced, well stopping operation is not required, operating is easy, safety and environment-friendly risks are avoided, the time rate of an oil well is increased, a failed well caused due to the fact that the sealing packing is additionally arranged is avoided, and the using method has significant economic benefits.

PROPPANT FOR HYDRAULIC FRACTURING OF OIL AND GAS WELLS AND PROCESS FOR DECREASING OR ELIMINATING "FLOW-BACK" EFFECT IN OIL AND GAS WELLS" The present invention relates to a proppant for the hydraulic fracturing of oil or gas wells, which consists of a mixture of from 10 to 95% by weight of a spherical proppant and from 5 to 90% by weight of an angular material, the percentages being based on the total weight of the mixture. The proppant obtained according to the present invention is useful for eliminating or decreasing th e "flow-back" phenomenon in operations in oil or gas wells.

Pipe joint retaining device for pipe-jacking method tunnel engineering The invention discloses a pipe joint retaining device for pipe-jacking method tunnel engineering. The pipe joint retaining device comprises a hydraulic pump, a rotary shaft gear, a retaining pin, jacking heads and hydraulic rods. Retaining clamping grooves are formed in a retaining plate, the retaining plate is connected with the rotary shaft gear through a connector, a bottom supporting structure and a pipe jacking pipe joint are connected through supporting columns, a motor is connected with the hydraulic pump, a back supporting structure is connected with a hydraulic jack set, a controller and a hydraulic unit are arranged at the lower end of the hydraulic jack set, a side support is connected with a vertical support, and the jacking heads are connected with the hydraulic rods. According to the pipe joint retaining device for pipe-jacking method tunnel engineering, an existing pipe joint retaining device for pipe-jacking method tunnel engineering is used in combination for creative design, according to the pipe joint retaining device for pipe-jacking method tunnel engineering, the treatment scheme that the motor, the hydraulic pump, the retaining plate and the side support are combined is adopted for retaining the pipe jacking pipe joint, and the retaining effect is greatly improved.

ALTERNATIVE EXPORT PATHWAYS FOR VECTOR EXPRESSED RNA INTERFERENCE The present invention is directed to nucleic acid molecules containing a loop sequence designed to circumvent exportin-5 mediated export, and methods using these novel molecules.

BUILDING MANAGEMENT EQUIPMENT PURPOSE:To provide the building management equipment in which an arrangement time for deciding a specification of an interface is reduced, simple design is attained and the extension performance is improved. CONSTITUTION:A central monitor panel 10 and an installation controller 13 of each installation equipment are connected with an interface 12 and an interface logic model adopting an object orientation analysis is applied between the monitor panel 10 and the controller 13, and interface information such as operation, monitor, setting and maintenance is formed to a model to simplify the specification of the interface 12 and to make it clear. Furthermore, the communication for maintenance and setting is realized by providing an exclusive file transfer mode in the interface 12. Moreover, the design of the interface is much more simplified by adopting a model for the interface information. Thus, the interface 12 is built up without grasping mutual configuration between the central monitor panel 10 and each installation equipment and the information is communicated with each other, the arrangement time for building up the interface is much reduced and the simple design and the improvement of the extension performance are attained.

Wireless transmission apparatus and self-checking method of wireless transmission apparatus A wireless transmission apparatus includes a service processing unit, a duplexer, a radio frequency receiving unit, a frequency synthesizer, and a controller. The controller controls, according to a reduced TR interval, the frequency synthesizer to adjust a frequency of a local oscillation signal which is output by the frequency synthesizer to the radio frequency receiving unit. The service processing unit continues to send a service signal as a self-checking signal, and a part of the self-checking signal leaks into the radio frequency receiving unit through the duplexer. After the radio frequency receiving unit mixes a received signal with the local oscillation signal, a frequency of the self-checking signal included in an output signal falls within a pass-band range of an intermediate frequency receiving unit, which ensures that the self-checking signal can be looped back to the service processing unit, thereby determines whether a fault occurs in its own transmission channel.

Improvements relating to hydraulic apparatus for mining machinery 816,702. Mine roof supports. DOWTY MINING EQUIPMENT Ltd. April 5, 1956 [April 4, 1955], No. 9791/55. Drawings to Specification. Class 20(2) In a mine-roof supporting apparatus comprising hydraulic props between roof and floor bars and a hydraulic jack between the floor bar and a mobile structure such as a conveyer, for advancing the supporting apparatus and the conveyer alternately the supply and release of hydraulic fluid to and from the props is through the hollow piston rod and the cylinder chamber of the jack from and to pressure and release means. The subjectmatter of this Specification is described in Specification 823,127.
REGULATION OF GENE EXPRESSION USING ENGINEERED NUCLEASES The present disclosure is in the field of genome engineering, particularly targeted modification of the genome of a hematopoietic cell.

SINGLE-DOUGH COOKIES Incorporation of a carbohydrase into cookie dough provides, via a special baking process, a cookie having a storage stable texture which emulates that of freshly baked, home-style, drop-type cookies. The process for making these cookies involves 1) retarding enzyme activity in the finished dough before baking; 2) deactivating the enzyme in a portion of the cookie, preferably the surface; 3) activating the remainder of the enzyme; 4) allowing the remaining active enzyme to operate on the carbohydrates in the cookie; and 5) final baking.

Ovine and bovine interferon TAU, compositions thereof and pharmaceutical uses thereof The present invention describes the production of ovine and bovine interferon-tau proteins and polypeptides derived therefrom. The antiviral and anticellular proliferation properties of these proteins and polypeptides are disclosed. One advantage of the proteins of the present invention is that they do not have cytotoxic side-effects when used to treat cells. Structure/function relationships for the ovine and bovine interferon-tau protein are also described.

PHOSPHORYLMURAMYL-PEPTIDES AND PHARMACEUTICAL COMPOSITIONS Phosphorylmuramyl peptides of the formula <IMAGE> are immuno-potentiating. In the formula, R1 represents optionally substituted alkyl or aryl, R2, R4, R6 and R7 represent, for example, hydrogen, R3 represents hydrogen or lower alkyl, R5 represents, for example, hydrogen, lower alkyl, hydroxy-lower alkyl, amino-lower alkyl, cycloalkyl, cycloalkyl-lower alkyl, aryl or aralkyl, or nitrogen-containing heterocyclyl or heterocyclyl-lower alkyl, and one of the radicals A1 and A2 represents a radical of the formula (II) <IMAGE> (II) In the formula (II), T represents NH or O, Y represents an optionally substituted alkylene group, which may also be interrupted by one or two oxycarbonyl and/or iminocarbonyl groups, and W represents an aliphatic radical or a cycloalkyl or cycloalkenyl radical having more than 6 carbon atoms. The other of the radicals A1 and A2 represents free or etherified hydroxy, amino, lower alkylamino or aminocarbonyl-lower alkylamino.

AEROSOL GENERATING DEVICE Provided is an aerosol generating device including a case in which a heater for heating a cigarette is installed, a bracket for supporting components installed inside the case, a fastening member for fastening the case and the bracket, and a cap that is installed on an outer surface of the case in an inseparable manner to conceal the fastening member in the case.

SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR COMMUNICATING MEDIA SIGNALS. A media streaming system for streaming media signals is provided. The media streaming system takes a library of separate and distinct CODECs (145) that are provided as a searchable CODEC library and used in determining specific characteristics in the media signal to identify similar sections of the signal. The media streaming system uses a computer implemented intelligence system, such as an intelligence mechanism to learn and capture the unique charateristics of a signal as the signal is being streamed (150). The media streaming system also compresses and decompresses the media signal as the signals are streamed from a source media (100) to a destination device (130, 135, 140).

A REAL ESTATE MEDIATING SYSTEM AND METHOD PURPOSE: A system for transmitting and registering real estate for sale, and a method thereof are provided to obtain information about a buyer who registers real estate of a seller as interesting real estate and accommodation agencies which is registered with real estate of a seller. CONSTITUTION: A joint relay server(101) manages real estate information registered in an accommodation agency. A normal transaction server(102) copies information about real estate registered in the joint relay server and a transaction information server. The normal transaction server registers the information copied. The joint relay server sets a condition of an accommodation agency about real estate which a general personal member registers and registers real estate. The joint relay server searches the accommodation agency corresponding to the preset condition among accommodation agencies registered.

ICAM-4 AND METHOD FOR APPLYING IT IN DIAGNOSING DISEASES FIELD: medicine. SUBSTANCE: method involves taking rigid sample from a patient, making sample contact to antibody showing immunoreactive properties with respect to ICAM-4 polypeptide. Quantitative evaluation of ICAM-4 antibody binding level is carried out and compared to a control. EFFECT: accelerated neuropathology diagnosis. 10 cl, 6 tbl

System and method for communicating media signals A media streaming system for streaming media signals is provided. The media streaming system takes a library of separate and distinct CODECs that are provided as a searchable CODEC library and used in determining specific characteristics in the media signal to identify similar sections of the signal. The media streaming system uses a computer implemented intelligence system, such as an artificial intelligence mechanism to learn and capture the unique characteristics of a sinal as the signal is being streamed. The media streaming system also compresses and decompresses the media signal as the signals are streamed from a source media to a destination device.

DRY EXTRUSION COOKING OF SUGAR OR SUGARLESS PRODUCTS The present invention pertains to a method for preparing a confection from a sugar or sugarless bulking agent which comprises, in the downstream direction of conveyance, the continuous sequence of steps of: a) introducing the bulking agent into the barrel of a twin screw extruder equipped with multiple heating zones; b) extrusion mixing the bulking agent in a first series of heating zones to melt the bulking agent, wherein the first series of heating zones is configured to include a minimum time for melting the bulking agent; c) extrusion mixing the melted bulking agent from the first series of heating zones to an orifice plug, wherein the orifice plug is configured to include a minimum time for melting the bulking agent; d) extrusion mixing the melted bulking agent from the orifice plug to a heating zone having a pressure control valve, wherein the pressure control valve is configured to include a minimum time for melting the bulking agent; e) extrusion mixing the melted bulking agent from the heating zone having the pressure control valve to a heating zone having a vent port, wherein the vent port is configured to include a minimum evaporation time to reduce the moisture content of the confection to less than about 2 %; and f) extrusion mixing the melted bulking agent from the heating zone having the vent port to the exit of the extruder to form a glassy confection. This invention also pertains to confections prepared by the inventive method.

CIGARETTE FILTER AND FILTER-TIPPED CIGARETTE A SINGLE-SEGMENT FILTER HAVING A FILTER PLUG (120) USES A HIGH-RIGIDITY AND HIGH-PERMEABILITY PAPER LONGITUDINAL RIGIDITY OF WHICH IS 30 OR HIGHER AS MEASURED IN ACCORDANCE WITH JIS P8143 AND AIR PERMEABILITY OF WHICH IS 1000 CORESTA UNITS OR GREATER AS A FILTER PLUG WRAPPER (121) WRAPPING A FILTER MATERIAL (123), AND A MULTISEGMENT FILTER HAVING A PLURALITY OF FILTER PLUGS USES THE HIGH-RIGIDITY AND HIGH-PERMEABILITY PAPER AS A FILTER PLUG WRAPPER (221, 231) WRAPPING A FILTER MATERIAL (223, 233) AND/OR A SHAPING PAPER (240) JOINING PLURALITY OF FILTER PLUGS. A CIGARETTE COMPRISES THE PARTICULAR FILTER.

Handling APN based congestion control and related communication device A method of handling a plurality of mobile devices in a wireless communication system for a network of the wireless communication system is disclosed. Each of the plurality of mobile devices has at least one connection to an access point name (APN) of the wireless communication system. The method comprises selecting at least one mobile device from the plurality of mobile devices, wherein each of the at least one mobile device does not have a connection with a high priority to the APN; and transmitting a request message with a back-off timer to the at least one mobile device, for detaching the at least one mobile device from the APN; wherein the APN is congested or overloaded.

METHODS FOR ENHANCING ANIMAL DIGEST PALATABILITY. The invention provides methods for enhancing the palatability of animal digests by adding anti-gelling agents to animal digests while adjusting the pH to a pH optimal for proteases used to hydrolyze viscera proteins. The anti-gelling agents maximize the production of viscera protein hydrolysates that can participate in Maillard reactions and increase palatability of the animal digest.

PARTICULATE DISPENSER Particulate dispenser can include a housing enclosing a receiving space. The housing having a fluid inlet aperture and a particulate input aperture, and a fluid outlet aperture. A hopper can be disposed above the housing and coupled to feed particulate from the hopper to the particulate input aperture. A wheel disposed within in the receiving space having at least one distribution aperture extending from the top surface to the bottom surface. The apertures being disposed at respective positions so that rotation of the wheel alternately aligns the distribution aperture with the particulate input aperture to feed particulate from the particulate input aperture into the distribution aperture and then aligns the distribution aperture with the fluid input aperture and the fluid output aperture to feed the particulate from the distribution aperture into the fluid flowing through the distribution aperture as the wheel rotates.

Fiber containing compositions and methods of making and using same A composition comprising at least about 25% of a fiber component, by weight of the composition, provides a safe and effective amount of fiber component to a user. A method of producing such a composition is provided. Additionally a method of providing a safe and effective amount of fiber component to a user is provided.

System for managing hotel property right and interval ownership The invention provides a system for managing hotel property right and interval ownership. The system comprises a client and a hotel management end. The system has the advantages that each room of a hotel is divided into 52 common property rights, each common property right is sold to a purchaser (user), and the purchaser owns the 1/52 property right of the room and can use the room for a week every year; the hotel accommodation right (interval ownership) can be exchanged with other hotel owners (interval ownership owners); the user who owns the property right of the room naturally owns the series of rights such as appreciation, assignment, presentation and inheritance, interval ownership dividing is the consumption mode of the tourist-site hotel, and property right dividing is the investment or business mode of the tourist-site hotel; the property right and the interval ownership are combined to bring the function utility of real estate into play to the maximum degree, the economic pressure of tourism development is reduced, and chances for appreciation on investments are created for social users.

DEVICE AND METHOD FOR CONTROLLING THE BEGINNING OF A TOOL OPERATION IN FISH TREATMENT MACHINE The invention relates to fish treatment machines which operate with a guidin g element for the fish, in the form of a chisel (20) introduced into the anal orifice of the animal, whereby the correct functioning of the downstream too l (21) depends on the correct positioning of said chisel. The aim of the invention is to avoid damage to the fish due to incorrect positioning of the chisel/fish and to guarantee correct positioning of the fish with regard to the tool. The chisel is assigned a monitoring device (30) comprising a senso r (31) for the positioning of the chisel/fish, a computer (32) for comparing t he desired and and real values with respect to the sensor values in addition to comprising an actuation device for the tool impinged upon by signals emitted by the computer. The sensor (31) can be a transmitting/receiving device whic h comprises a light source (312) and a light guide (311).

Device and method for high-throughput quantification of mRNA from whole blood Disclosed are a method, device kit, and automated system for simple, re-producible, and high-throughput quantification of mRNA from whole blood. More particularly, the method, device, kit and automated system involve combinations of leukocyte filters attached to oligo(dT)-immobilized multi-well plates.

NUCLEIC ACID PREPARATION COMPOSITIONS AND METHODS Provided herein are methods and compositions to extract and enrich by, physical separation or amplification, relatively short nucleic acids from a nucleic acid composition containing a high background of longer nucleic acids (e.g., host or maternal nucleic acids; genomic nucleic acid and the like).
Synthetic antibodies against VEGF and their uses The invention provides novel synthetic antibodies directed against VEGF and uses thereof.

HERBICIDE-RESISTANT AHAS-MUTANTS AND METHODS OF USE The invention provides transgenic or non-transgenic plants with improved levels of tolerance to AHAS-inhibiting herbicides. The invention also provides nucleic acids encoding mutants of the acetohydroxyacid synthase (AHAS) large subunit, expression vectors, plants comprising the nucleic acids encoding the AHASL subunits containing one, two, or more mutations, plants comprising such AHASL subunit mutant nucleic acids, methods for making and using the same, and methods of controlling weeds.

Particulate dispenser Particulate dispenser can include a housing enclosing a receiving space. The housing having a fluid inlet aperture and a particulate input aperture, and a fluid outlet aperture. A hopper can be disposed above the housing and coupled to feed particulate from the hopper to the particulate input aperture. A wheel disposed within in the receiving space having at least one distribution aperture extending from the top surface to the bottom surface. The apertures being disposed at respective positions so that rotation of the wheel alternately aligns the distribution aperture with the particulate input aperture to feed particulate from the particulate input aperture into the distribution aperture and then aligns the distribution aperture with the fluid input aperture and the fluid output aperture to feed the particulate from the distribution aperture into the fluid flowing through the distribution aperture as the wheel rotates.

REVOCATION INFORMATION MANAGEMENT Systems and/or methods ("tools") are described that enable encrypted media files to be sent without revocation lists while permitting the encrypted media files to be passed to trusted entities. The tools may also ensure continuation of protection when media files are passed between different protection systems.

Apparatus and method for obtaining formation samples An apparatus and method for collecting a fluid from a subterranean formation are disclosed. A fluid sample container has an elongated body. The elongated body includes an internal cavity, a first end having a first opening for receiving the downhole fluid into the internal cavity, a second end axially displaced from the first end, the second end having a second opening for expelling at least a portion of the downhole fluid from the internal cavity. Fluid collecting includes establishing fluid communication with a formation of interest and the fluid sample container receiving the downhole fluid into the internal cavity through the first opening and expelling at least a portion of the downhole fluid from the internal cavity through the second opening.

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL FUSION PROTEINS AND USES THEREOF The present invention relates to a fusion protein and to methods of treatment comprising administering a therapeutically effective amount of the fusion protein to a patient in need thereof.

Methods for enhancing animal digest palatability The invention provides methods for enhancing the palatability of animal digests by adding anti-gelling agents to animal digests while adjusting the pH to a pH optimal for proteases used to hydrolyze viscera proteins. The anti-gelling agents maximize the production of viscera protein hydrolysates that can participate in Maillard reactions and increase palatability of the animal digest.

Herbicide-resistant AHAS-mutants and methods of use The invention provides transgenic or non-transgenic plants with improved levels of tolerance to AHAS-inhibiting herbicides. The invention also provides nucleic acids encoding mutants of the acetohydroxyacid synthase (AHAS) large subunit, expression vectors, plants comprising the nucleic acids encoding the AHASL subunits containing one, two, or more mutations, plants comprising such AHASL subunit mutant nucleic acids, methods for making and using the same, and methods of controlling weeds.

Restricted immunoglobulin heavy chain mice Mice having a restricted immunoglobulin heavy chain locus are provided, wherein the locus is characterized by a single polymorphic human VH gene segment, a plurality of human DH gene segments and a plurality of JH gene segments. Methods for making antibody sequences that bind an antigen (e.g., a viral antigen) are provided, comprising immunizing a mouse with an antigen of interest, wherein the mouse comprises a single human VH gene segment, a plurality of human DH gene segments and a plurality of JH gene segments, at the endogenous immunoglobulin heavy chain locus.

PROTEASE VARIANTS AND COMPOSITIONS Enzymes produced by mutating the genes for a number of subtilases and expressing the mutated genes in suitable hosts are presented. The enzymes exhibit improved wash performance in any detergent in comparison to their wild type parent enzymes.

INFORMATION PROCESSING APPARATUS, COMMUNICATION SYSTEM, AND METHOD FOR DETECTING COMMUNICATION STATE OF INFORMATION PROCESSING APPARATUS [Problem] To ascertain an appropriate communication state in a wireless communication. [Solution] An information processing apparatus comprises an acquiring unit and a generating unit. The acquiring unit acquires both an interference index, which indicates an interference degree in the wireless communication between a wireless communication apparatus and a base station to which the wireless communication apparatus is connected, and positional information about a position related to the interference index. The generating unit determines, on the basis of the acquired positional information, an interference index related to a target area for detecting a communication state of the wireless communication apparatus, and generates, on the basis of the determined interference index, communication state information for informing the communication state.

Data processing method and device, electronic equipment and computer readable medium Embodiments of the invention provide a data processing method and device, electronic equipment and a computer readable medium. The method comprises the steps of obtaining state information of an application APP; according to the state information, a navigation stack of the APP and data on a page corresponding to the navigation stack are stored, and the navigation stack and the data on the page corresponding to the navigation stack are used for constructing a current scene; and when a start recovery operation of the APP is detected, performing recovery processing on the current scene accordingto the stored navigation stack and the data on the page corresponding to the navigation stack. According to the method, after the application program is restarted abnormally or a normal person restarts the application program, a recovery function is achieved, and the page and data on the page before the application program is abnormal or before the application program is normally restarted are recovered.

REMOTE PRESSURE READOUT WHILE DEPLOYING AND UNDEPLOYING COILED TUBING AND OTHER WELL TOOLS A well tool has a pressure sensor disposed in an interior space. The pressure sensor has at least one sensing element estimating a pressure parameter of a fluid in the interior space and a transponder configured to transmit radio frequency (RF) signals representative of the estimated pressure parameter. A data retrieval module receives the RF signals transmitted by the transmitter.

Wireless transmission device and self-checking method thereof A wireless transmission device and a self-checking method thereof are provided in embodiments of this invention. The wireless transmission device includes a service processing unit, a duplexer, a radio frequency receiving unit, a frequency synthesizer and a controller. The controller starts the self-checking function, reduces TR interval to a predetermined range, and according to the reduced TR interval, controls the frequency synthesizer to adjust the frequency of a local oscillation signal which is output to the radio frequency receiving unit. The service processing unit continues to send a service signal as a self-checking signal. After the self-checking signal is modulated into a radio signal, part of the self-checking signal can leak in the radio frequency receiving unit though the duplexer. After the radio frequency receiving unit mixes the received signal and the local oscillation signal, the frequency of the self-checking signal in the output signal drops into a band-pass range of a middle frequency receiving unit so as to guarantee the self-checking signal to circulate back to the service processing unit and confirm whether the self transmission path is failed.

Aerosol provision system An aerosol provision system comprises a liquid storage area comprising a liquid formulation; an aerosol generating area; and a membrane disposed between the liquid storage area and the aerosol generating area, the membrane fluidly communicating the liquid storage area with the aerosol generating area, wherein the liquid formulation has a water content of at least 18% w/w.

Herbicide-resistant AHAS-mutants and methods of use The invention provides transgenic or non-transgenic plants with improved levels of tolerance to AHAS-inhibiting herbicides. The invention also provides nucleic acids encoding mutants of the acetohydroxyacid synthase (AHAS) large subunit, expression vectors, plants comprising the nucleic acids encoding the AHASL subunits containing one, two, or more mutations, plants comprising such AHASL subunit mutant nucleic acids, methods for making and using the same, and methods of controlling weeds.

A METHOD OF AND A DEVICE FOR DETERMINING OPERATIONAL PARAMETERS OF A COMPUTATIONAL MODEL OF BOREHOLE EQUIPMENT, AN ELECTRONIC CONTROLLER AND BOREHOLE EQUIPMENT. A method of and a device for computer controlled determination of operational parameters of a computational model of borehole equipment for drilling a borehole in an earth formation. The borehole equipment comprising a rotational drive system, a drill string having a bottom hole assembly and a top end coupled to the rotational drive system, and a speed controller for controlling rotational drive speed of the drive system. The drive system is controlled such that a torque provided by the drive system while driving the drill string is varied over a time period. From the varying torque and rotational top end drive speed of the drill string an estimated torque-speed transfer function is obtained and matched with a torque-speed transfer function computed from the computational model of the borehole equipment. The operational parameters are determined from the matched estimated torque-speed transfer function and the computed torque-speed transfer function.

SINGLE-DOUGH COOKIES Incorporation of a carbohydrase into cookie dough provides, via a special baking process, a cookie having a storage stable texture which emulates that of freshly baked, home-style, drop-type cookies. The process for making these cookies involves 1) retarding enzyme activity in the finished dough before baking; 2) deactivating the enzyme in a portion of the cookie, preferably the surface; 3) activating the remainder of the enzyme; 4) allowing the remaining active enzyme to operate on the carbohydrates in the cookie; and 5) final baking.

Neutral protease (NP) and product by using neutral protease for tissue dissociation as well as method for the production thereof The use of a neutral protease (NP) together with a collagenase consists in that a neutral protease which is not contained in a collagenase enzyme preparation and which is not produced by a recombinant production ia mixed before the beginning of a tissue dissociation with a collagenase or a collagenase enzyme preparation with an individual dosage of the quantitative proportions of neutral protease and collagenase for improving the isolation results with respect to yield, viability and integrity of the cells.

AEROSOL PROVISION SYSTEM An aerosol provision system comprising: a liquid storage area comprising a liquid formulation; an aerosol generating area; a membrane disposed between the liquid storage area and the aerosol generating area, said membrane fluidly communicating the liquid storage area with the aerosol generating area; wherein the liquid formulation has a water content of at least 18 pcnt w/w.

PERFORATING GUN SYSTEM An improved perforating gun system is provided. The perforating gun system includes a perforating gun having a shaped charge positioning tube that is securely received within a female opening in a tandem to provide a 360-degree connection to ground. The shaped charge positioning tube includes segmented end portions that extend over first and second contact housings. Each contact housing includes a contact pin that is biased outwardly by a spring, the spring comprising a portion of an electrical path for a firing signal.

System and method for three-dimensional video coding Systems and methods are provided for receiving and encoding 3D video. The receiving method comprises: accepting a bitstream with a current video frame encoded with two interlaced fields, in a MPEG-2, MPEG-4, or H.264 standard; decoding a current frame top field; decoding a current frame bottom field; and, presenting the decoded top and bottom fields as a 3D frame image. In some aspects, the method presents the decoded top and bottom fields as a stereo-view image. In other aspects, the method accepts 2D selection commands in response to a trigger such as receiving a supplemental enhancement information (SEI) message, an analysis of display capabilities, manual selection, or receiver system configuration. Then, only one of the current frame interlaced fields is decoded, and a 2D frame image is presented.

USER TERMINAL AND RADIO COMMUNICATION METHOD To prevent occurrence of delay and/or increase in power consumption at the time of access to a network in future radio communication systems, one aspect of a user terminal according to the present disclosure includes: a receiving section that receives a synchronization signal block including a broadcast channel in a certain sync raster; and a control section that controls, based on certain bit information of a certain information element included in the synchronization signal block, a sync raster to be detected by variably interpreting bit information included in at least one of the certain information element and another information element.

Automatic adjustment method and storage medium for land planning purposes The invention provides a automatic adjustment method and a storage medium for land planning purposes, and the method comprises the steps: carrying out mesh generation in a range of the minimum bounding rectangle of an adjustable land parcel, and obtaining an adjustable land parcel mesh mask layer; marking the attribute of each grid in the adjustable plot grid mask layer; respectively obtaining a first set of unadjusted complete grid units and a second set of unadjusted incomplete grid units, and sorting the first set of unadjusted complete grid units and the second set of unadjusted incompletegrid units according to coded values; calculating to obtain an ideal minimum complete grid number and an area remainder; and obtaining a target grid from the first set and the second set. According to the invention, automation of spatial planning purpose calling can be realized on the premise of controlling errors; the functions of traceability, replay and rollback of the planning process are achieved; furthermore, the invention can achieve the quick, centralized and continuous obtaining of a candidate set of a called-out land parcel, and achieves the searching and positioning of the plannedcalled-out land parcel of the construction land efficiently.

REVOCATION INFORMATION MANAGEMENT Systems and/or methods ("tools") are described that enable encrypted media files to be sent without revocation lists while permitting the encrypted media files to be passed to trusted entities. The tools may also ensure continuation of protection when media files are passed between different protection systems.

Restricted immunoglobulin heavy chain mice Mice having a restricted immunoglobulin heavy chain locus are provided, wherein the locus is characterized by a single polymorphic human VH gene segment, a plurality of human DH gene segments and a plurality of JH gene segments. Methods for making antibody sequences that bind an antigen (e.g., a viral antigen) are provided, comprising immunizing a mouse with an antigen of interest, wherein the mouse comprises a single human VH gene segment, a plurality of human DH gene segments and a plurality of JH gene segments, at the endogenous immunoglobulin heavy chain locus.

Improvements in Apparatus for Electrocuting Animals. 17,603. Fairholme, E. G., and Clarke, A. D. July 24. Electric killing-appliances.-Cats, dogs, &c. are killed by electricity in a chamber b, Fig. 2, which slides into a casing a' and is covered by a sliding lid b', the casing and lid being provided with windows a', b<3>. When the chamber b is pulled out on to brackets a<8>, it is held by a spring catch c<4>, and is returned by springs c<2> when the catch is released by a treadle &c. c<5>, so that contact is made between plates d<6> and buffers e connected to a transformer &c. within the compartment t. The electrodes d covering most of the chamber bare separated by an insulating-strip d<1>, over which one of the electrodes projects to avoi i a dead surface, and have clips engaging strips d<4> fitted upon removable insulating slates &c. b<1> and connected to the contacts d<6>. A switch enables the current to be applied as the chamber b returns into position, or subsequently. For killing kittens &c., a smaller chamber f, Fig. 6, is fitted within the chamber b. It is open at the top and bottom and is lined with electrodes f<1> which contact with the strips d' through springs f<3>.

UNDERSEA PACKAGE AND INSTALLATION SYSTEM PCT No. PCT/GB90/00292 Sec. 371 Date Nov. 28, 1990 Sec. 102(e) Date Nov. 28, 1990 PCT Filed Feb. 23, 1990 PCT Pub. No. WO90/10139 PCT Pub. Date Sep. 7, 1990.An operational package comprising either a pump/driver package (1; 100) or a valve package (250) is retrievably installed at a subsea station by a receptacle (10; 110; 251). Co-operating connection means on the package and the receptacle establish fluid and/or electrical connection between the package and the receptacle on reception of the package within the receptacle. Seal means (14) carried by the package are moved into a condition to seal any such fluid connections. Installation is effected by establishing a running loop extending from a surface vessel downwardly through the receptacle (10; 110) and upwardly to the surface vessel outside the receptacle, the package (1; 100) being moved on and guided by the wire loop from the surface vessel into the receptacle. Alternatively, a handling tool (120) is employed with co-operating releasable connecting means (151) on the handling tool and the receptacle, and operating means (124, 125) operable between the handling tool and the package to effect movement of the package inwardly of the receptacle, after connection of the connecting means.

FUSION PROTEINS COMPRISING FACTOR IX FOR PROPHYLACTIC TREATMENT OF HEMOPHILIA AND METHODS THEREOF The present invention relates to prophylactic dosing regimens with long-acting factor IX (FIX) in dosing intervals of 1 week or longer, including (but not limited to) 10 days or longer, such as two weeks, three weeks or even monthly.

SYSTEM FOR SELLING A IMMOVABLE PROPERTY GOODS PIECE BY PIECE AND PROCESSING METHOD OF THE SAME A system for dividing and selling real estate goods, and a processing method thereof are provided to reduce investment risk for real estate of each floor/region and enable an investor to own the real estate with a small investment by enabling the investors to buy and sell a divided commercial/residential building and land, automatically processing a registry, and registering information of each divisional investor. Each network terminal(A1-An) enables divided real estate buyer/sellers to upload buying/selling information, and transmit a buying, selling, and share ratio selection signal to a divided real estate goods sale/management server(DAMSS). Each registry server(B1-Bn) receives and registers registry application information received from the divided real estate goods sale/management server. The divided real estate goods sale/management server displays the selling information for the real estate goods, sells the real estate goods by dividing the real estate goods according to a specific ratio, and processes the registry of the buyer/seller when the divided real estate goods are traded.

Method and apparatus for reduced settling time in a filter for a DC voltage The dielectric absorbtion of capacitors in a filter that removes the AC component from a precision digital-to-analog converter (DAC) is effectively eliminated by operating the normally grounded end of the filter at a DC voltage that approximates the DC output voltage from the precision DAC. This prevents the capacitors in the filter from becoming charged to a DC voltage, and has the further benefit of reducing the number of time constants otherwise spent in charging and discharging those capacitors to within some specified percentage of the output DC voltage. The result is greatly reduced settling time for the filter. The filter may be of any convenient type. The precision DAC may be of the type that switches between ground and a precision reference voltage with a precisely controlled duty cycle, and the approximating voltage may be obtained from any conventional DAC.

CHRYSOSPORIUM CELLULASE AND METHODS OF USE The subject invention relates to novel compositions of neutral and/or alkaline cellulase and methods for obtaining neutral and/or alkaline cellulase compositions from Chrysosporium cultures, in particular Chrysosporium lucknowense. This invention also provides mutants and methods of generating mutants of Chrysosporium capable of producing neutral and/or alkaline cellulase. This invention also relates to the genes encoding the enzymes comprising the neutral and/or alkaline cellulase composition. In addition, this invention provides methods of culturing Chrysosporium to produce neutral and/or alkaline cellulases. The neutral and/or alkaline cellulase compositions of the subject invention can be used in a variety of processes including stone washing of clothing, detergent processes, deinking, color brightening, depilling and biobleaching of paper and pulp and treatment of waste streams. The present invention also relates to the isolation and purification of cellulase enzymes, having glucanase and cellobiohydrolase activity, and useful for stonewashing applications.

System and method for communicating media signals A system for encoding a video signal includes an input module to receive a media signal to be communicated to a destination device, the media signal being divided into a plurality of segments each comprising one or more temporally adjacent frames. The system also includes an a encoding module configured, for each of the plurality of segments, to test a plurality of different CODECs on a segment by encoding the segment using a plurality of CODECs to produce a respective plurality of encoded segments, the selection module being further configured to select the encoded segment having the highest image quality while satisfying at least one additional constraint. The system further includes an output module configured, for each of the plurality of segments, to deliver the selected segment to the destination device and report to the destination device which CODEC was used to encode the selected segment.

Flow control device, method and production adjustment arrangement A flow control device includes, a body defining at least a portion of a flow passageway, at least one movable member in operable communication with the body, movable between at least a first position that provides a first restriction to flow through the flow passageway and a second position that provides a second restriction to flow through the flow passageway, and a circuit in operable communication with the at least one movable member that is configured to sense conductivity of fluid flowing through the flow passageway and to promote movement of the at least one movable member to move from the first position to the second position in response to a change in conductivity of fluid flowing through the flow passageway.

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL FUSION PROTEINS AND USES THEREOF The present invention relates to a fusion protein and to methods of treatment comprising administering a therapeutically effective amount of the fusion protein to a patient in need thereof.

AEROSOL GENERATING DEVICE In one embodiment of the present invention, an aerosol generating device is disclosed, comprising: a case in which a heater is installed to heat a cigarette therein; a bracket for supporting parts installed in the case; a fastening member for fastening the case and the bracket; and a cap installed on an outer surface of the case to conceal the fastening member inside the case, and which is non-removable after installation.

Konjac block drying device The invention particularly relates to a konjac block drying device. The device comprises a frame, the frame is provided with a drying box, an air energy heat pump and a dehumidifier, a drying chamberis arranged in the drying box, the air outlet of the air energy heat pump communicates with the bottom of the drying chamber through a heat-supply pipe, the top of the drying chamber is connected to the air inlet of the dehumidifier through a heat recovery pipe, the air outlet of the dehumidifier communicates with the air inlet of the air energy heat pump through a circulation pipe, a rotating shaft is disposed in the drying cavity, one end of the rotating shaft passes through the bottom of the drying box and is connected to a rotating motor through a speed reducer, the rotating shaft is provided with a plurality of placing plates along the longitudinal direction of the rotating shaft, the placing plates are evenly spaced on the rotating shaft, the placing plates are all detachably connected to the rotating shaft, the placing plates are in a mesh structure, and a heat insulation layer is arranged outside the drying box. The device carries out circulating heat supply by using the air energy heat pump, and improves drying efficiency while saving energy.

Black tea automatic production line The invention relates to the technical field of tea processing and discloses a black tea automatic production line. The black tea automatic production line comprises a black tea withering machine, a rolling machine unit, a double-drum deblocking machine, a fermenting machine, a chain plate drying machine and a fragrance enhancing machine which are sequentially connected by virtue of arranged transportation connection devices. The black tea automatic production line is reasonable in design, adopts automatic production, completely adopts mechanized automatic production on each production process of black tea, is high in production efficiency, low in cost and high and stable in production quality and is clean and health.

Oligonucleotide modulation of protein kinase C Compositions and methods are provided for the treatment and diagnosis of diseases associated with protein kinase C. Oligonucleotides are provided which are specifically hybridizable with nucleic acids encoding PKC. Oligonucleotides specifically hybridizable with a translation initiation site, 5'-untranslated region or 3'-untranslated region are provided. Oligonucleotides specifically hybridizable with a particular PKC isozyme or set of isozymes are also provided. Methods of treating animals suffering from disease amenable to therapeutic intervention by modulating protein kinase C expression with an oligonucleotide specifically hybridizable with RNA or DNA corresponding to PKC are disclosed.

HEALTH RISK ASSESSMENT METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR TERRITORIAL SPATIAL PLANNING A health risk assessment method and system for territorial spatial planning. The method comprises: obtaining a spatial scale of an evaluation scheme (101); according to the spatial scale, determining a grid unit for carrying out health risk assessment (102); acquiring health risk basic data (103); determining risk factor data and background factor data according to the health risk basic data (104); respectively performing health impact assignment on the risk factor data and the background factor data according to the grid units to obtain various risk factor impact analysis graphs and wind field simulation analysis graphs (105); performing spatial superposition analysis on the various risk factor impact analysis graphs and the wind field simulation analysis graph to obtain a health risk comprehensive analysis grid graph (106); and determining planning optimization suggestions according to the health risk comprehensive analysis grid graph (107). The method and the system may comprehensively evaluate the negative health impact of the current territorial spatial environment or a planning scheme on residents.

KRILL-DERIVED CHITIN PRODUCTS AND METHODS OF MAKING SAME Methods of producing a chitin composition by which the properties of the chitin composition derived from krill, such as molecular weight (chain length) and degree of acetylation are reproducible, are claimed. Such reproducible production methods allow for a wide use of the chitin composition end products in pharmaceutical and biomedical applications. The methods also allow for the production of chitin compositions which preserve the native state of chitin.

OLIGONUCLEOTIDE COMPOSITIONS AND METHODS OF USE THEREOF Among other things, the present disclosure provides USH2A oligonucleotides, and compositions and methods of use thereof, for preventing and/or treating various conditions, disorders or diseases. In some embodiments, provided USH2A oligonucleotides comprise nucleobase modifications, sugar modifications, internucleotidic linkage modifications and/or patterns thereof, and have improved properties, activities and/or selectivities. In some embodiments, the present disclosure provides USH2A oligonucleotides, compositions and methods for preventing and/or treating USH2A-related conditions, disorders or diseases, such as Usher Syndrome (e.g., Usher Syndrome Type 2A), atypical Usher syndrome, or nonsyndromic retinitis pigmentosa.

USER PROFILE SERVICE

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a service distribution platform allowing user profile data to be accessed among a plurality of network applications.

SOLUTION: This user profile service is provided with: a gateway 350 having connection to a communication network 100; a mobile portal 352 having connection to the gateway; a mobile server 356 accessible by the mobile portal; and an application server 360 having a web service interface for connecting the mobile portal to the mobile server. The web service interface includes access to the mobile portal and access to a related database structure 362 for storing user profile data. The web service interface is used as a service distribution platform capable of registering user profile data for a service in the mobile server.
